campaignId  String\n  sequence    Int\n  state       String\n  reason      String\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  campaign    Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  @@index([campaignId, sequence])\n}\n\nmodel ViewedCeremony {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  campaignId  String\n  deviceId    String\n  eventId     String\n  viewedAt    DateTime @default(now())\n  @@unique([campaignId, deviceId, eventId])\n}\n\nmodel LoginAttempt {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  fingerprint String\n  succeeded   Boolean\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  @@index([fingerprint, createdAt])\n}\n\r\nimport type { Prisma } from \"@prisma/client\";\nimport { canTransition, type ClientProgressEvent, type ChapterState, type ProgressEventType } from \"@/domain/story\";\nimport { db } from …24 tokens truncated….updateMany({\n          where: { campaignId: campaign.id, key: { in: [artifact.key, artifact.connectedArtifactKey] } },\n          data: { state: \"CONNECTED\" },\n        });\n        type = \"ARTIFACT_CONNECTED\";\n        payload = { key: artifact.key, connectedArtifactKey: artifact.connectedArtifactKey };\n      } else if (action === \"DISCOVER_SIDE_QUEST\") {\n        const quest =\n          campaign.sideQuests.find((item) => item.key === options.targetKey) ??\n          campaign.sideQuests.find((item) => [\"HIDDEN\", \"RUMORED\"].includes(item.state));\n        if (!quest) throw new Error(\"No undiscovered side quest remains.\");\n        await tx.sideQuest.update({ where: { id: quest.id }, data: { state: \"DISCOVERED\" } });\n        type = \"SIDE_QUEST_DISCOVERED\";\n        payload = { key: quest.key, title: quest.title };\n      } else if (action === \"UPDATE_SIDE_QUEST\") {\n        const quest =\n          campaign.sideQuests.find((item) => item.key === options.targetKey) ??\n          campaign.sideQuests.find((item) => [\"DISCOVERED\", \"ACTIVE\", \"PARTIALLY_COMPLETE\"].includes(item.state));\n        if (!quest) throw new Error(\"No active side quest can be updated.\");\n        const objective = quest.objectives.find((item) => !item.complete);\n        if (objective) await tx.sideQuestObjective.update({ where: { id: objective.id }, data: { complete: true } });\n        await tx.sideQuest.update({ where: { id: quest.id }, data: { state: \"ACTIVE\" } });\n        type = \"SIDE_QUEST_UPDATED\";\n        payload = { key: quest.key, objectiveOrdinal: objective?.ordinal };\n      } else if (action === \"COMPLETE_SIDE_QUEST\") {\n        const quest =\n          campaign.sideQuests.find((item) => item.key === options.targetKey) ??\n          campaign.sideQuests.find((item) => [\"DISCOVERED\", \"ACTIVE\", \"PARTIALLY_COMPLETE\"].includes(item.state));\n        if (!quest) throw new Error(\"No active side quest can be completed.\");\n        await tx.sideQuestObjective.updateMany({ where: { sideQuestId: quest.id }, data: { complete: true } });\n        await tx.sideQuest.update({ where: { id: quest.id }, data: { state: \"COMPLETE\", completedAt: new Date() } });\n        type = \"SIDE_QUEST_COMPLETED\";\n        payload = { key: quest.key, title: quest.title, rewardLabel: quest.rewardLabel };\n      } else if (action === \"ADD_JOURNAL_ANNOTATION\") {\n        const entry = await tx.journalEntry.create({\n          data: {\n            campaignId: campaign.id,\n            title: \"Development margin note\",\n            body: options.value ?? \"A safe development observation was added beside the active clue.\",\n            kind: \"ANNOTATION\",\n            chapterOrdinal: chapter.ordinal,\n            releasedAt: new Date(),\n          },\n        });\n        type = \"JOURNAL_ANNOTATION_ADDED\";\n        payload = { key: entry.id, title: entry.title, chapterOrdinal: chapter.ordinal };\n      } else if (action === \"ADD_LOG_ENTRY\") {\n        type = \"PLAYER_LOG_ENTRY_ADDED\";\n        payload = { key: `log-${campaign.currentSequence + 1}`, title: options.value ?? \"Development captainâ€™s note\" };\n      } else if (action === \"TEASE_FINALE\") {\n        await tx.campaign.update({\n          where: { id: campaign.id },\n          data: {\n            finaleState: \"TEASED\",\n            finaleTeaser: \"A dormant arrangement of brass rings answers from behind the final seal.\",\n          },\n        });\n        type = \"FINALE_TEASED\";\n        payload = { state: \"TEASED\" };\n      } else if (action === \"UPDATE_FINALE_REQUIREMENT\") {\n        const requirements = JSON.parse(campaign.finaleRequirements) as Array<{\n          key: string;\n          label: string;\n          current: number;\n          target: number;\n          optional?: boolean;\n        }>;\n        const target = requirements.find((item) => item.key === options.targetKey) ?? requirements[0];\n        if (!target) throw new Error(\"No safe finale requirement is configured.\");\n        target.current = Math.min(target.target, target.current + 1);\n        await tx.campaign.update({\n          where: { id: campaign.id },\n          data: { finaleState: \"REQUIREMENTS_PARTIAL\", finaleRequirements: JSON.stringify(requirements) },\n        });\n        type = \"FINALE_REQUIREMENT_UPDATED\";\n        payload = { key: target.key };\n      } else if (action === \"PAUSE\") {\n        if (campaign.status === \"PAUSED\") throw new Error(\"Campaign is already paused.\");\n        await tx.campaign.update({ where: { id: campaign.id }, data: { status: \"PAUSED\" } });\n        type = \"CAMPAIGN_PAUSED\";\n      } else {\n        if (campaign.status === \"ACTIVE\") throw new Error(\"Campaign is already underway.\");\n        await tx.campaign.update({ where: { id: campaign.id }, data: { status: \"ACTIVE\" } });\n        type = \"CAMPAIGN_RESUMED\";\n      }\n    }\n    const event = await appendEvent(tx, campaign.id, type, payload, userId, reversesEventId);\n    await tx.campaignSnapshot.create({\n      data: { campaignId: campaign.id, sequence: event.sequence, state: JSON.stringify({ eventType: type, payload }) },\n    });\n    await tx.adminAuditLog.create({\n      data: {\n        campaignId: campaign.id,\n        userId,\n        action,\n        metadata: JSON.stringify({ eventId: event.id, sequence: event.sequence }),\n      },\n    });\n    return { campaignId: campaign.id, event };\n  });\n  const clientEvent: ClientProgressEvent = toClientEvent(result.event);\n  publishCampaignEvent(result.campaignId, clientEvent);\n  return { event: clientEvent, snapshot: await buildPublicSnapshot(result.campaignId) };\n}\n\r\nimport type { PublicArtifact, PublicChapter, PublicSideQuest, PublicSnapshot } from \"@/domain/story\";\nimport { eventToLogEntry } from \"@/domain/ships-log\";\nimport { db } from \"@/lib/db\";\n\nconst readableChapterStates = new Set([\"REVEALING\", \"ACTIVE\", \"SOLVED\", \"COMPLETE\"]);\nconst detailedQuestStates = new Set([\"DISCOVERED\", \"ACTIVE\", \"PARTIALLY_COMPLETE\", \"COMPLETE\", \"ARCHIVED\"]);\nconst detailedArtifactStates = new Set([\"DISCOVERED\", \"AWARDED\", \"INSPECTED\", \"CONNECTED\", \"ASSEMBLED\"]);\nconst coordinateStates = new Set([\"REVEALED\", \"ACTIVE_DESTINATION\", \"VISITED\", \"COMPLETED\", \"SIDE_QUEST\"]);\n\nfunction requirementList(raw: string): PublicSnapshot[\"finale\"][\"requirements\"] {\n  try {\n    const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);\n    return Array.isArray(parsed)\n      ? parsed.filter((item) => item && typeof item.key === \"string\" && typeof item.label === \"string\")\n      : [];\n  } catch {\n    return [];\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function buildPublicSnapshot(campaignId: string, playerAccessId?: string): Promise<PublicSnapshot> {\n  const campaign = await db.campaign.findUniqueOrThrow({\n    where: { id: campaignId },\n    include: {\n      chapters: {\n        orderBy: { ordinal: \"asc\" },\n        include: { content: true, clues: { orderBy: { ordinal: \"asc\" } }, hints: { orderBy: { ordinal: \"asc\" } } },\n      },\n      artifacts: { orderBy: { displayX: \"asc\" }, include: { awards: true } },\n      mapLocations: { orderBy: { key: \"asc\" } },\n      mapRoutes: { orderBy: { ordinal: \"asc\" } },\n      sideQuests: { orderBy: { key: \"asc\" }, include: { objectives: { orderBy: { ordinal: \"asc\" } } } },\n      journalEntries: { where: { releasedAt: { not: null } }, orderBy: { createdAt: \"asc\" } },\n      events: { where: { releaseAt: { lte: new Date() } }, orderBy: { sequence: \"desc\" }, take: 250 },\n    },\n  });\n  const viewed = playerAccessId\n    ? await db.viewedContent.findMany({ where: { playerAccessId }, select: { contentType: true, contentKey: true } })\n    : [];\n  const viewedKeys = new Set(viewed.map((item) => `${item.contentType}:${item.contentKey}`));\n  const isUnseen = (type: string, key: string, released: boolean) => released && !viewedKeys.has(`${type}:${key}`);\n\n  const chapters: PublicChapter[] = campaign.chapters.map((item) => {\n    const readable = readableChapterStates.has(item.state);\n    const chapter: PublicChapter = {\n      ordinal: item.ordinal,\n      state: item.state as PublicChapter[\"state\"],\n      ...(item.safeTeaser ? { teaser: item.safeTeaser } : {}),\n      unseen: isUnseen(\"chapter\", String(item.ordinal), readable),\n    };\n    if (!readable) return chapter;\n    const annotations = campaign.journalEntries\n      .filter((entry) => entry.chapterOrdinal === item.ordinal)\n      .map((entry) => ({\n        key: entry.id,\n        title: \"CHAPTER_PREPARED\",\n  \"CHAPTER_RELEASED\",\n  \"CHAPTER_REVEAL_STARTED\",\n  \"CHAPTER_REVEAL_COMPLETED\",\n  \"CHAPTER_SOLVED\",\n  \"HINT_RELEASED\",\n  \"ARTIFACT_AWARDED\",\n Record<ChapterState, readonly ChapterState[]> = {\n  LOCKED: [\"TEASER\", \"READY\"],\n  TEASER: [\"READY\", \"LOCKED\"],\n  READY: [\"REVEALING\", \"LOCKED\"],\n  REVEALING: [\"ACTIVE\", \"READY\"],\n  ACTIVE: [\"SOLVED\", \"READY\"],\n  SOLVED: [\"COMPLETE\", \"ACTIVE\"],\n  COMPLETE: [\"SOLVED\"],\n};\n\nexport function canTransition(from: ChapterState, to: ChapterState) {\n  return validTransitions[from].includes(to);\n}\n\nexport const gmActionSchema = z.object({\n  action: z.enum([\n    \"PREPARE_CHAPTER\",\n    \"RELEASE_CHAPTER\",\n    \"MARK_SOLVED\",\n PublicChapter = {\n  ordinal: number;\n  state: ChapterState;\n  title?: string;\n  narrative?: string;\n  objective?: string;\n  riddle?: string;\n  teaser?: string;\n  hints?: Array<{ ordinal: number; body: string; releasedAt: string; unseen: boolean }>;\n  annotations?: Array<{ key: string; title: string; body: string; createdAt: string; unseen: boolean }>;\n  related?: { mapKey?: string; artifactKey?: string; sideQuestKey?: string };\n  unseen?: boolean;\n};\n\nexport type PublicMapLocation = {\n  key: string;\n  state: string;\n  label: string;\n  name: string;\n  regionLabel?: string;\n  locationType?: string;\n  description?: string;\n  exactness?: string;\n  x?: number;\n  y?: number;\n  mobileX?: number;\n  mobileY?: number;\n  chapterOrdinal?: number;\n  sideQuestKey?: string;\n  unseen: boolean;\n};\n\nexport type PublicArtifact = {\n  key: string;\n  state: string;\n  name?: string;\n  safeName?: string;\n  category?: string;\n  description?: string;\n  discoveryText?: string;\n  silhouetteLabel?: string;\n  displayX: number;\n  displayY: number;\n  assemblyGroup?: string;\n  assemblyPosition?: string;\n  connectedArtifactKey?: string;\n  chapterOrdinal?: number;\n  awardedAt?: string;\n  unseen: boolean;\n};\n\nexport type PublicSideQuest = {\n  key: string;\n  state: string;\n  title?: string;\n  teaser?: string;\n  description?: string;\n  objectives?: Array<{ ordinal: number; body: string; complete: boolean }>;\n  reward?: { type: string; label?: string };\n  completionSummary?: string;\n  chapterOrdinal?: number;\n  mapLocationKey?: string;\n  artifactKey?: string;\n  unseen: boolean;\n};\n\nexport type PublicLogEntry = {\n  key: string;\n  sequence: number;\n  title: string;\n  summary: string;\n  timestamp: string;\n  symbol: string;\n  importance: \"quiet\" | \"notable\" | \"major\";\n  section: \"journal\" | \"chart\" | \"treasures\" | \"quests\" | \"log\" | \"finale\";\n  targetKey?: string;\n  unseen: boolean;\n};\n\nexport type PublicSnapshot = {\n  campaign: { slug: string; title: string; status: string };\n  sequence: number;\n  chapter: PublicChapter;\n  chapters: PublicChapter[];\n  artifacts: PublicArtifact[];\n  mapLocations: PublicMapLocation[];\n  mapRoutes: Array<{\n    key: string;\n    fromKey: string;\n    toKey: string;\n    ordinal: number;\n    state: string;\n   teaser?: string;\n    requirements: Array<{ key: string; label: string; current: number; target: number; optional?: boolean }>;\n    unseen: boolean;\n  };\n  unseen: Record<\"journal\" | \"chart\" | \"treasures\" | \"quests\" | \"log\" | \"finale\", number>;\n};\n\nexport type ClientProgressEvent = {\n  id: string;\n  type: ProgressEventType;\n  sequence: number;\n  payload: Record<string, unknown>;\n  releaseAt: string;\n};\n\nexport function mergeEvents<T extends { id: string; sequence: number }>(existing: T[], incoming: T[]) {\n  const byId = new Map(existing.map((event) => [event.id, event]));\n  for (const event of incoming) byId.set(event.id, event);\n  return [...byId.values()].sort((a, b) => a.sequence - b.sequence);\n}\n\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

return;\n    const key = \"forever-harbor-arrival\";\n    const scene = sessionStorage.getItem(key) === \"seen\" ? \"session-reentry\" : \"first-arrival\";\n    sessionStorage.setItem(key, \"seen\");\n    void director.play(scene, { root: root.current, queue: false }).catch(() => undefined);\n    return () => director.cancel(\"landing-unmounted\");\n  }, [director]);\n\n  const replay = () => {\n    if (!root.current) return;\n    void director.play(\"first-arrival\", { root: root.current, queue: false }).catch(() => undefined);\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <main ref={root} className=\"harbor-landing\" data-motion-mode={mode}>\n      <div className=\"harbor-sky\" data-scene-part=\"sky\" data-gsap-owned aria-hidden=\"true\">\n        <div className=\"star-field\" Number(request.headers.get(\"last-event-id\") ?? new URL(request.url).searchParams.get(\"after\") ?? 0);\n  const encoder = new TextEncoder();\n  let heartbeat: ReturnType<typeof setInterval>;\n  const stream = new ReadableStream({\n    async start(controller) {\n      controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(\": tide connected\\n\\n\"));\n      const send = (event: ClientProgressEvent) =>\n        controller.enqueue(\n          encoder.encode(`id: ${event.sequence}\\nevent: progression\\ndata: ${JSON.stringify(event)}\\n\\n`),\n        );\n      const missed = await db.progressEvent.findMany({\n        where: {\n          campaignId: access.campaignId,\n          sequence: { gt: Number.isFinite(requested) ? requested : 0 },\n          releaseAt: { lte: new Date() },\n        },\n        orderBy: { sequence: \"asc\" },\n      });\n      missed.forEach((event) => send(toClientEvent(event)));\n      const channel = `campaign:${access.campaignId}`;\n      eventBus.on(channel, send);\n      heartbeat = setInterval(\n        () => controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(`event: heartbeat\\ndata: ${Date.now()}\\n\\n`)),\n        15000,\n      );\n      request.signal.addEventListener(\"abort\", () => {\n        clearInterval(heartbeat);\n        eventBus.off(channel, send);\n        try {\n          controller.close();\n        } catch {}\n \"@/lib/security\";\nimport { buildPublicSnapshot } from \"@/lib/snapshot\";\n\nexport async function GET(_: Request, context: { params: Promise<{ campaignSlug: string }> }) {\n  const { campaignSlug } = await context.params;\n  const access = await requirePlayer(campaignSlug);\n  if (!access) return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invitation required.\" }, { status: 401 });\n  return NextResponse.json(await buildPublicSnapshot(access.campaignId, access.id), {\n    headers: { \"Cache-Control\": \"no-store, private\" },\n  });\n}\n\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

The original Campaign models above\n+// continue to power the existing Forever Treasure experience while authored tales\n+// use an immutable publish-and-session model.\n+model TallTale {\n+  id                       String   @id @default(cuid())\n+  slug                     String   @unique\n+  title                    String\n+  subtitle                 String?\n+  shortDescription         String?\n+  longDescription          String?\n+  coverAssetId             String?\n+  theme                    String   @default(\"CARTOGRAPHERS_TABLE\")\n+  status                   String   @default(\"DRAFT\")\n+  visibility               String   @default(\"PRIVATE\")\n+  creatorId                String\n+  currentDraftRevisionId   String?\n+  latestPublishedVersionId String?\n+  playerCountMin           Int      @default(1)\n+  playerCountMax           Int      @default(4)\n+  estimatedDuration        Int?\n+  contentWarnings          String?\n+  sortOrder                Int      @default(0)\n+  featured                 Boolean  @default(false)\n+  archivedAt               DateTime?\n+  createdAt                DateTime @default(now())\n+  updatedAt                DateTime @updatedAt\n+  drafts                   TaleDraft[]\n+  versions                 PublishedTaleVersion[]\n+  assets                   TaleAsset[]\n+  collections              TaleAssetCollection[]\n+  locations                TaleLocation[]\n+  storyArtifacts           TaleArtifact[]\n+  sessions                 TaleSession[]\n+  @@index([status, visibility, sortOrder])\n+  @@index([creatorId, updatedAt])\n+}\n+\n+model TaleDraft {\n+  id                          String   @id @default(cuid())\n+  taleId                      String\n+  revisionNumber              Int      @default(1)\n+  basedOnPublishedVersionId   String?\n+  createdBy                   String\n+  autosaveVersion             Int      @default(1)\n+  validationState             String   @default(\"NOT_VALIDATED\")\n+  validationSummary           String   @default(\"{}\")\n+  lastValidatedAt             DateTime?\n+  createdAt                   DateTime @default(now())\n+  updatedAt                   DateTime @updatedAt\n+  tale                        TallTale @relation(fields: [taleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n+  chapters                    TaleChapter[]\n+  @@unique([taleId, revisionNumber])\n+  @@index([taleId, updatedAt])\n+}\n+\n+model TaleChapter {\n+  id                String   @id @default(cuid())\n+  draftRevisionId   String\n+  title             String\n+  subtitle          String?\n+  description       String?\n+  orderIndex        Int\n+  coverAssetId      String?\n+  estimatedDuration Int?\n+  entryBlockId      String?\n+  completionBlockId String?\n+  isOptional        Boolean  @default(false)\n+  metadata          String   @default(\"{}\")\n+  createdAt         DateTime @default(now())\n+  updatedAt         DateTime @updatedAt\n+  draft             TaleDraft @relation(fields: [draftRevisionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n+  blocks            StoryBlock[]\n+  @@unique([draftRevisionId, orderIndex])\n+  @@index([draftRevisionId])\n+}\n+\n+model StoryBlock {\n+  id             String   @id @default(cuid())\n+  chapterId      String\n+  blockType      String\n+  title          String\n+  internalLabel  String?\n+  orderIndex     Int\n+  configuration  String   @default(\"{}\")\n+  presentation   String   @default(\"{}\")\n+  completion     String   @default(\"{}\")\n+  nextBlockId    String?\n+  creatorNotes   String?\n+  isEnabled      Boolean  @default(true)\n+  schemaVersion  Int      @default(1)\n+  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())\n+  updatedAt      DateTime @updatedAt\n+  chapter        TaleChapter @relation(fields: [chapterId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n+  outgoing       BlockConnection[] @relation(\"BlockConnectionSource\")\n+  incoming       BlockConnection[] @relation(\"BlockConnectionTarget\")\n+  @@unique([chapterId, orderIndex])\n+  @@index([chapterId, blockType])\n+}\n+\n+model BlockConnection {\n+  id                  String   @id @default(cuid())\n+  sourceBlockId       String\n+  targetBlockId       String\n+  connectionType      String   @default(\"DEFAULT\")\n+  conditionExpression String?\n+  label               String?\n+  orderIndex          Int      @default(0)\n+  createdAt           DateTime @default(now())\n+  source              StoryBlock @relation(\"BlockConnectionSource\", fields: [sourceBlockId], references: [id], onDelete: TaleAssetTagLink {\n+  assetId String\n+  tagId   String\n+  asset   TaleAsset @relation(fields: [assetId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n+  tag     TaleAssetTag @relation(fields: [tagId], onDelete: Cascade)\n+  asset        TaleAsset @relation(fields: [assetId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n+  @@unique([collectionId, assetId, label])\n+  @@index([assetId])\n+}\n+\n+model            DateTime?\n+  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())\n+  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt\n+  tale                    TallTale @relation(fields: [taleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n+  @@unique([taleId, slug])\n+  @@index([taleId, orderIndex])\n+}\n+\n+model TaleArtifact {\n+  id                      String   @id @default(cuid())\n+  taleId                  String\n+  name                    String\n+  shortDescription        String?  @db.Text\n+  loreDescription         String?  @db.LongText\n+  ordinaryGameObjectLabel String?\n+  artworkAssetId previewMode           Boolean  @default(false)\n+  draftRevisionId       String?\n+  variables             String   @default(\"{}\") @db.LongText\n+  inventory             String   @default(\"[]\") @db.LongText\n+  startedAt             DateTime @default(now())\n+  updatedAt             DateTime @updatedAt\n+  completedAt           DateTime?\n+  expiresAt             DateTime?\n+  lastHeartbeatAt       DateTime?\n+  tale                  TallTale @relation(fields: [taleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n+  version               PublishedTaleVersion @relation(fields: [publishedVersionId], references: [id])\n+  events                TaleSessionEvent[]\n+  verificationRequests  TaleVerificationRequest[]\n+  helperPairings        TaleHelperPairing[]\n+  @@index([taleId, status, previewMode])\n+  @@index([publishedVersionId, status])\n+}\n+\n+model TaleSessionEvent {\n+  id                    String   @id @default(cuid())\n+  sessionId             String\n+  publishedVersionId    String\n+  blockId               String?\n+  eventType             String\n+  sourceType            String\n+  sourceId              String?\n+  idempotencyKey createdAt])\n+}\n+\n+model TaleVerificationRequest {\n+  id                    String   @id @default(cuid())\n+  sessionId             String\n+  blockId               String\n+  providerType          String\n+  status                String   @default(\"PENDING\")\n+  requestedAt           DateTime @default(now())\n+  resolvedAt            DateTime?\n+  expiresAt             DateTime?\n+  configurationSnapshot String   @default(\"{}\") @db.LongText\n+  providerCorrelationId String?\n+  satisfiedByEventId    String?\n+  session               TaleSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n+  submissions           TaleVerificationEvent[]\n+  @@index([sessionId, status, requestedAt])\n+  @@index([blockId, status])\n+}\n+\n+model TaleVerificationEvent {\n+  id                 String   @id @default(cuid())\n+  requestId          String\n+  eventId            String   @unique\n+  idempotencyKey     String   @unique\n+  schemaVersion      Int      @default(1)\n+  providerType       String\n+  providerInstanceId String?\n+  result             String\n+  confidence         Float?\n+  evidence           String   @default(\"{}\") @db.LongText\n+  observedAt         DateTime\n+  accepted           Boolean  @default(false)\n+  rejectionReason    String?  @db.Text\n+  createdAt          DateTime @default(now())\n+  request            TaleVerificationRequest @relation(fields: [requestId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n+  @@index([requestId, createdAt])\n+}\n+\n+model TaleHelperPairing {\n+  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n+  sessionId  String\n+  deviceId   String\n+  tokenHash  String   @unique\n+  status     String   @default(\"ACTIVE\")\n+  expiresAt  DateTime\n+  lastSeenAt DateTime?\n+  revokedAt  DateTime?\n+  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())\n+  session    TaleSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n+  @@index([sessionId, status])\n+}\n*** End Patch";
text(await tools.apply_patch(patch));

## Assistant
**Timestamp:** 2026-07-17T21:06:46.807Z

The foundation is now defined as an additive, versioned Tall Tale domain, so the existing Forever Treasure campaign remains intact while Studio-authored tales gain their own drafts, immutable releases, assets, sessions, audit events, verification requests, and helper pairings. I’m implementing the block registry and authoritative publish/progression services next; those are the critical seam shared by Studio, Player, Captain, and the future vision simulator.

\"wait\") return \"timer\";\n+  const configured = String(configuration.verificationProvider ?? configuration.completionMode ?? \"playerConfirmation\");\n+  if (configured === \"automatic\") return null;\n+  if ([\"captainManual\", \"playerConfirmation\", \"textAnswer\", \"timer\", \"visionLocation\", \"visionObject\", \"externalWebhook\"].includes(configured)) return configured as VerificationProviderType;\n+  return \"playerConfirmation\";\n+}\n*** End Patch";

{\n+            id: block.id,\n+            chapterId: createdChapter.id,\n+            blockType: block.blockType,\n+            title: block.title,\n+            internalLabel: block.internalLabel || null,\n+            orderIndex: blockIndex,\n+            configuration: json(block.configuration),\n+            presentation: json(block.presentation),\n+            completion: Set(flattened.map((block) => block.id));\n+    for (let index = 0; index < flattened.length; index += 1) {\n+      const block = flattened[index];\n+      const fallback = flattened[index + 1]?.id ?? null;\n+      const connections: Array<{ target: string; type: string; label?: string; condition?: string }> = [];\n+      if (block.type === \"choice\" && Array.isArray(block.configuration.choices)) \"\";\n+          if (allBlockIds.has(target)) connections.push({ target, type: \"CHOICE\", label: String(choice.label ?? \"Choice\") });\n+        }\n+      } else if (block.type === \"condition\") {\n+        const success = String(block.configuration.successTargetBlockId ?? \"\");\n+        const failure = String(block.configuration.failureTargetBlockId ?? \"\");\n+        if (allBlockIds.has(success)) connections.push({ target: success, type: \"SUCCESS\", condition: json({ result: true }) });\n+        if (allBlockIds.has(failure)) connections.push({ target: failure, type: \"FAILURE\", condition: json({ result: false }) });\n+      }\n+      if (!connections.length && fallback) connections.push({ target: fallback, type: \"DEFAULT\" });\n+      await 1) {\n+        const connection = connections[connectionIndex];\n+        await tx.blockConnection.create({ data: { sourceBlockId: block.id, targetBlockId: connection.target, connectionType: connection.type, label: connection.label, conditionExpression: connection.condition, orderIndex: connectionIndex } });\n+      }\n+    }\n+    const updated = await tx.taleDraft.findUniqueOrThrow({ : undefined } });\n+}\n+\n+export async function duplicateStudioTale(taleId: string, creatorId: string) {\n+  const source = await getStudioTale(taleId);\n+  const base = longDescription: source.tale.longDescription ?? undefined, theme: source.tale.theme, playerCountMin: source.tale.playerCountMin, playerCountMax: source.tale.playerCountMax, estimatedDuration: getStudioTale(created.id);\n+  await saveStudioDraft(created.id, {\n+    autosaveVersion: target.draft.autosaveVersion,\n+    tale: { ...source.tale, title: `${source.tale.title} Copy`, slug, visibility: \"PRIVATE\" },\n+    chapters: source.draft.chapters.map((chapter) => ({ ...chapter, id: crypto.randomUUID(), blocks: chapter.blocks.map((block) => ({ ...block, id: crypto.randomUUID() })) } });\n+  if (existing) return existing;\n+  const updated = await tx.taleSession.update({ where: { id: session.id }, data: { currentSequence: { increment: 1 } }, select: { currentSequence: true } });\n+  return tx.taleSessionEvent.create({\n+    data: {\n+      sessionId: session.id,\n+      publishedVersionId: versionIdentity(session),\n+      blockId: input.blockId ?? null,\n+ createRequestForBlock(tx: Prisma.TransactionClient, sessionId: string, block: PublishedBlock) {\n+  const providerType = providerForBlock(block.blockType, block.configuration);\n+  if (!providerType) return null;\n+  if (futureProviders.has(providerType)) throw new Error(`${providerType} cannot be activated until a helper provider is installed.`);\n+  const existing = await tx.taleVerificationRequest.findFirst({ where: { sessionId, blockId: block.id, status: \"PENDING\" } });\n+  if (existing) return existing;\n+  const seconds = Number(block.configuration.durationSeconds ?? 0);\n+  return tx.taleVerificationRequest.create({\n+    data: {\n+      sessionId,\n+      blockId: block.id,\n+      providerType,\n+      expiresAt: [] }),\n+    },\n+  });\n+}\n+\n+async function enterBlock(\n+  tx: Prisma.TransactionClient,\n+  session: { id: string; publishedVersionId: string | null; draftRevisionId: string | null },\n+ (config.operator) {\n+    case \"notEquals\": return actual !== expected;\n+    case \"greaterThan\": return Number(actual) > Number(expected);\n+    case \"lessThan\": return Number(actual) < Number(expected);\n+    case \"contains\": return Array.isArray(actual) ? actual.includes(expected) : String(actual ?? \"\").includes(String(expected ?? \"\"));\n+    default: return actual === expected;\n+  }\n+}\n+\n+function nextBlock(snapshot: PublishedTaleSnapshot, current: PublishedBlock, variables: JsonObject, inventory: string[], selectedTarget?: string) {\n+  const blocks = blocks.find((block) => block.id === configured) ?? null;\n+  }\n+  const target = current.connections.find((connection) => connection.connectionType === \"DEFAULT\")?.targetBlockId ?? \"setVariable\") return variables;\n+  const result = { ...variables };\n+  const key = String(block.configuration.variable ?? \"\");\n+  const operation = String(block.configuration.operation ?? \"set\");\n+  if (!key) return result;\n+  if (operation === \"increment\") result[key] = Number(result[key] ?? 0) + Number(block.configuration.value ?? 1);\n+  else if (operation === \"decrement\") (block.blockType === \"choice\" && selectedTarget) variables[`choice:${block.id}`] = selectedTarget;\n+  await tx.taleSession.update({ where: { id: session.id }, data: { variables: JSON.stringify(variables), inventory: JSON.stringify(nextInventory) } });\n+  const completed = await appendEvent(tx, session, { eventType: \"blockCompleted\", sourceType, sourceId, blockId: block.id, idempotencyKey });\n+  if (block.blockType === \"taleComplete\") {\n+    await tx.taleSession.update({ where: { id: session.id }, data: { status: \"COMPLETED\", completedAt: new Date() } });\n+ correlationId: idempotencyKey });\n+    return completed;\n+  }\n+  let target = nextBlock(snapshot, block, variables, nextInventory, selectedTarget);\n+  const seen = new Set<string>();\n+  while (target && [\"condition\", \"setVariable\"].includes(target.blockType) && !seen.has(target.id)) {\n+    seen.add(target.id);\n+    await enterBlock(tx, session, snapshot, target, \"progression\", });\n+    await appendEvent(tx, session, { eventType: \"blockCompleted\", sourceType: \"progression\", blockId: target.id, idempotencyKey: `${idempotencyKey}:logic:${target.id}`, payload: { automatic: true }, correlationId: idempotencyKey });\n+    target = nextBlock(snapshot, target, variables, nextInventory);\n+  }\n+  if (!target) {\n+    await tx.taleSession.update({ where: { id: session.id }, startTaleSession(taleSlug: string, ownerLabel?: string) {\n+  const tale = await db.tallTale.findFirst({ where: { slug: taleSlug, archivedAt: null, latestPublishedVersionId: { not: null }, visibility: { in: [\"PUBLIC\", \"UNLISTED\"] } }, include: { versions: { where: { isCurrent: true }, take: 1 } } });\n+  const version = tale?.versions[0];\n+  if (!tale || !version) throw new Error(\"This Tall Tale is not currently available.\");\n+  const snapshot = parsePublishedSnapshot(version.contentSnapshot);\n+  const first = flatten(snapshot)[0];\n+  if (!first) throw new Error(\"This published tale session = await tx.taleSession.create({ data: { taleId: tale.id, publishedVersionId: version.id, ownerLabel: ownerLabel?.trim() || \"Guest crew\", accessTokenHash: hashToken(token), currentChapterId: };\n+}\n+\n+export async function startPreviewSession(taleId: string, creatorId: string, startBlockId?: string) {\n+  const studio = await getStudioTale(taleId);\n+  const snapshot = mode.\");\n+  const token = randomBytes(32).toString(\"base64url\");\n+  const correlation = randomUUID();\n+  const result = await db.$transaction(async (tx) => {\n+    const session = await tx.taleSession.create({ data: { taleId, publishedVersionId: null, ownerLabel: \"Studio preview\", captainId: creatorId, accessTokenHash: hashToken(token), currentChapterId: chapterFor(snapshot, emitSession(result.session.id, result.event);\n+  return { sessionId: result.session.id, token, taleSlug: studio.tale.slug, versionId: `draft:${studio.draft.id}` };\n+}\n+\n+function sanitizeConfiguration(block: PublishedBlock) {\n+  const configuration = structuredClone(block.configuration);\n+  delete configuration.acceptedAnswers;\n+  delete configuration.captainNotes;\n+  delete configuration.captainInstruction;\n+  delete configuration.futureProviderOptions;\n+  return configuration;\n+}\n+\n+export async function getTaleSessionState(sessionId: string, token?: string, session.verificationRequests[0] ?? null;\n+  return {\n+    session: { id: session.id, status: session.status, previewMode: session.previewMode, versionId: versionIdentity(session), ownerLabel: const status = input.action === \"pause\" ? \"PAUSED\" : \"ACTIVE\";\n+      await tx.taleSession.update({ where: { id: sessionId }, data: { status } });\n+      return appendEvent(tx, current, { input.idempotencyKey);\n+    return audit;\n+  });\n+  emitSession(sessionId, event);\n+  return { accepted: true };\n+}\n+\n+export async function listCaptainSessions() {\n+  const sessions = await db.taleSession.findMany({ orderBy: { updatedAt: \"desc\" }, take: 100, include: { tale: true, version: true, verificationRequests: { where: { status: \"PENDING\" }, take: 1 } } });\n+  return sessions.map((session) => ({ id: session.id, taleId: session.taleId, taleTitle: session.tale.title, versionLabel: session.version?.versionLabel ?? \"Draft preview\", ownerLabel: session.ownerLabel, status: session.status, previewMode: session.previewMode, currentBlockId: session.currentBlockId, pendingVerification: session.verificationRequests[0] ? { id: session.verificationRequests[0].id, providerType: session.verificationRequests[0].providerType, requestedAt: session.verificationRequests[0].requestedAt.toISOString() } : null, lastEventAt: session.updatedAt.toISOString(), connected: Boolean(session.lastHeartbeatAt && Date.now() - session.lastHeartbeatAt.getTime() < 45000) }));\n+}\n+\n+export async function createHelperPairing(sessionId: string, deviceId: string) {\n+  const token = randomBytes(32).toString(\"base64url\");\n+  const pairing = await db.taleHelperPairing.create({ data: { sessionId, deviceId, tokenHash: hashToken(token), expiresAt: new Date(Date.now() + 15 * 60 * 1000) } });\n+  return { pairingId: pairing.id, token, expiresAt: pairing.expiresAt.toISOString() };\n+}\n+\n+export async function submitHelperVerification(token: string, submission: VerificationSubmission) {\n+  const pairing = await db.taleHelperPairing.findFirst({ where: { tokenHash: hashToken(token), status: \"ACTIVE\", revokedAt: null, expiresAt: { gt: new Date() } } });\n+  if (!pairing || pairing.sessionId !== submission.sessionId) throw new VerificationRejectedError(\"invalidPairing\");\n+  await db.taleHelperPairing.update({ where: { id: pairing.id }, data: { lastSeenAt: new Date() } });\n+  return submitVerification(submission, { sourceType: \"helper\", sourceId: pairing.deviceId });\n+}\n*** End Patch";

session.id, publishedVersionId: identity(session), blockId: input.blockId ?? null, eventType: input.eventType, sourceType: input.sourceType, sourceId: input.sourceId ?? null, idempotencyKey: });\n+}\n+\n+async function createRequest(tx: Prisma.TransactionClient, sessionId: string, block: PublishedBlock) {\n+  const providerType = providerForBlock(block.blockType, block.configuration);\n+ existing = await tx.taleVerificationRequest.findFirst({ where: { sessionId, blockId: block.id, status: \"PENDING\" } });\n+  if (existing) return existing;\n+  const duration = Number(block.configuration.durationSeconds ?? 0);\n+  return tx.taleVerificationRequest.create({ data: { sessionId, blockId: block.id, providerType, expiresAt: providerType === \"timer\" && duration > 0 ? new Date(Date.now() + duration * 1000) : null, configurationSnapshot: JSON.stringify(block.configuration) } });\n+}\n+\n+async function enterBlock(\n+  tx: Prisma.TransactionClient,\n+  session: { id: string; publishedVersionId: string | null; draftRevisionId: string | null },\n+  snapshot: PublishedTaleSnapshot,\n+  block: PublishedBlock,\n+  sourceType: string,\n+  sourceId: string | null,\n+ chapter?.id ?? null, lastHeartbeatAt: new Date() } });\n+  const event = await appendEvent(tx, session, { eventType: \"blockEntered\", sourceType, sourceId, blockId: block.id, idempotencyKey: `${correlationId}:enter:${block.id}`, payload: { chapterId: chapter?.id, blockType: block.blockType }, correlationId });\n+  const request = await createRequest(tx, session.id, block);\n+  if (request) await appendEvent(tx, session, { eventType: \"verificationRequested\", sourceType: \"progression\", blockId: block.id, idempotencyKey: `${correlationId}:request:${block.id}`, payload: { providerType: request.providerType }, correlationId, verificationRequestId: request.id });\n+  return event;\n+}\n+\n+function conditionPasses(block: PublishedBlock, variables: JsonObject, inventory: string[]) {\n+  const config = block.configuration;\n+  const key = String(config.variable ?? \"\");\n+  const actual = key.startsWith(\"artifact:\") ? inventory.includes(key.slice(9)) : variables[key];\n+  const expected = config.value;\n+  if (config.operator === \"notEquals\") return actual !== expected;\n+  if (config.operator === \"greaterThan\") return Number(actual) > Number(expected);\n+  if (config.operator === \"lessThan\") return Number(actual) < Number(expected);\n+  if (config.operator === \"contains\") return Array.isArray(actual) ? actual.includes(expected) : String(actual ?? \"\").includes(String(expected ?? \"\"));\n+  return actual === expected;\n+}\n+\n+function chooseNext(snapshot: PublishedTaleSnapshot, block: PublishedBlock, variables: JsonObject, inventory: string[], selected?: string) {\n+  const blocks = blocksOf(snapshot);\n+  if (selected) return blocks.find((candidate) => candidate.id === selected) ?? null;\n+  if (block.blockType === \"condition\") {\n+    const target = String(block.configuration[conditionPasses(block, variables, inventory) ? \"successTargetBlockId\" : \"failureTargetBlockId\"] ?? \"\");\n+    return blocks.find((candidate) => candidate.id === target) ?? null;\n+  }\n+  const target = block.connections.find((connection) => connection.connectionType === \"DEFAULT\")?.targetBlockId ?? block.nextBlockId;\n+  return blocks.find((candidate) => candidate.id === target) ?? null;\n+}\n+\n+function mutateVariables(block: PublishedBlock, variables: JsonObject) {\n+  if (block.blockType !== \"setVariable\") return variables;\n+  const next = { ...variables };\n+  const key = String(block.configuration.variable ?? \"\");\n+  const operation = String(block.configuration.operation ?? \"set\");\n+  if (!key) return next;\n+  if (operation === \"increment\") next[key] = Number(next[key] ?? 0) + Number(block.configuration.value ?? 1);\n+  else if (operation === \"decrement\") next[key] = Number(next[key] ?? 0) - Number(block.configuration.value ?? 1);\n+  else if (operation === \"toggle\") next[key] = !Boolean(next[key]);\n+  else next[key] = block.configuration.value;\n+  return next;\n+}\n+\n+async function completeBlock(\n+  tx: Prisma.TransactionClient,\n+  session: { id: string; publishedVersionId: string | null; draftRevisionId: string | null; variables: string; inventory: string },\n+  snapshot: PublishedTaleSnapshot,\n+  block: PublishedBlock,\n+  sourceType: string,\n+  sourceId: string | null,\n+  key: string,\n+  selectedTarget?: string,\n+) {\n+  const completedBefore = await tx.taleSessionEvent.findFirst({ where: { sessionId: session.id, blockId: block.id, eventType: \"blockCompleted\" } });\n+  if (completedBefore) return completedBefore;\n+  let variables = mutateVariables(block, parseJsonObject(session.variables));\n+  let inventory = parseJsonArray<string>(session.inventory);\n+  if ([\"artifactReveal\", input.idempotencyKey, payload: { fromBlockId: current.currentBlockId, targetBlockId: target.id, reason: input.reason ?? \"No reason supplied\" } });\n+    await enterBlock(tx, current, snapshot, deviceId, tokenHash: digest(token), expiresAt: new Date(Date.now() + 15 * 60 * 1000) } });\n+  return { pairingId: pairing.id, token, expiresAt: pairing.expiresAt.toISOString() };\n+}\n+\n+export 4).toString() === \"RIFF\" && buffer.subarray(8, 12).toString() === \"WAVE\";\n+  return false;\n+}\n+\n+async function store(storageKey: string, buffer: Buffer) {\n+  const target = string) {\n+  const metadata = await sharp(buffer).metadata();\n+  const definitions = [\n+    { role: \"THUMBNAIL\", width: 360, quality: 72 },\n+    { role: \"PREVIEW\", width: 960, quality: 78 },\n+    { role: \"OPTIMIZED\", width: 1800, quality: 84 },\n+    { role: \"MOBILE\", width: 900, quality: 80 },\n+  ];\n+  const items: Array<{ role: string; storageKey: string; mimeType: string; buffer: Buffer; width: number | null; height: number | null; checksum: string }> = [];\n+  for (const definition of definitions) {\n+    const output = await sharp(buffer).rotate().resize({ width: definition.width, withoutEnlargement: true }).webp({ quality: definition.quality }).toBuffer({ resolveWithObject: true });\n+    const storageKey = `${folder}/${randomUUID()}.webp`;\n+    items.push({ role: definition.role, storageKey, mimeType: \"image/webp\", buffer: output.data, width: output.info.width, height: output.info.height, checksum: createHash(\"sha256\").update(output.data).digest(\"hex\") });\n+  }\n+  return { width: metadata.width ?? null, height: metadata.height ?? null, items };\n+}\n+\n+export async function ingestAsset(taleId: string, file: File, userId: string, replaceAssetId?: string) {\n+  const definition = supported.get(file.type);\n+  if (!definition) throw new Error(\"Unsupported file type. Use PNG, JPEG, WebP, AVIF, MP4, WebM, MP3, Ogg, WAV, or PDF.\");\n+  const maximum = Number(process.env.TALL_TALE_MAX_UPLOAD_MB ?? 25) * 1024 * 1024;\n+  if (!file.size || file.size > maximum) throw new Error(`Files must be smaller than ${Math.round(maximum / 1024 / 1024)} MB.`);\n+  const buffer = Buffer.from(await file.arrayBuffer());\n+  if (!hasValidSignature(buffer, file.type)) throw new Error(\"The file contents do not match the reported media type.\");\n+  const checksum = createHash(\"sha256\").update(buffer).digest(\"hex\");\n+  if (!replaceAssetId) {\n+    const duplicate = await db.taleAsset.findUnique({ where: { taleId_checksum: { taleId, checksum } }, include: { variants: true, tags: { include: { tag: true } }, roles: true } });\n+    if (duplicate) return { asset: duplicate, duplicate: true };\n+  }\n+  const folder = randomUUID();\n+  const originalKey = `${folder}/${randomUUID()}${definition.extension}`;\n+  await store(originalKey, buffer);\n+  let width: number | null = null;\n+  let height: number | null = null;\n+  let derivatives: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof derivativeSet>>[\"items\"] = [];\n+  if (definition.mediaType === \"IMAGE\") {\n+    const processed = await derivativeSet(buffer, folder);\n+    width = processed.width;\n+    height = processed.height;\n+    derivatives = processed.items;\n+    for (const item of derivatives) await store(item.storageKey, item.buffer);\n+  }\n+  const asset = await db.$transaction(async (tx) => {\n+    const record = replaceAssetId\n+      ? await tx.taleAsset.update({ where: { id: replaceAssetId }, data: { displayName: file.name.replace(/\\.[^.]+$/, \"\"), originalFilename: file.name, mimeType: file.type, fileSize: file.size, width, height, checksum, mediaType: definition.mediaType, deletedAt: null } })\n+      : await tx.taleAsset.create({ data: { taleId, mediaType: definition.mediaType, displayName: file.name.replace(/\\.[^.]+$/, \"\"), originalFilename: file.name, mimeType: file.type, fileSize: file.size, width, height, checksum, createdBy: userId } });\n+    const original = await tx.taleAssetVariant.create({ data: { assetId: record.id, role: \"ORIGINAL\", storageKey: originalKey, mimeType: file.type, fileSize: file.size, width, height, checksum } });\n+    let current = original;\n+    for (const item of derivatives) current = await tx.taleAssetVariant.create({ data: { assetId: record.id, role: item.role, storageKey: item.storageKey, mimeType: item.mimeType, fileSize: item.buffer.length, width: item.width, height: item.height, checksum: item.checksum } });\n+    await tx.taleAsset.update({ where: { id: record.id }, data: { currentVariantId: derivatives.find((item) => item.role === \"OPTIMIZED\") ? current.id : original.id } });\n+    return tx.taleAsset.findUniqueOrThrow({ where: { id: record.id }, include: { variants: { orderBy: { createdAt: \"desc\" } }, tags: { include: { tag: true } }, roles: true } });\n+  });\n+  return { asset, duplicate: false };\n+}\n+\n+export async function assetUsages(taleId: string, assetId: string) {\n+  const studio = await getStudioTale(taleId);\n+  const usages: Array<{ type: string; id: string; label: string; field?: string }> = [];\n+  if (studio.tale.coverAssetId === assetId) usages.push({ type: \"tale\", id: taleId, label: \"Tall Tale cover\", field: \"coverAssetId\" });\n+  for (const chapter of studio.draft.chapters) {\n+    if (chapter.coverAssetId === assetId) usages.push({ type: \"chapter\", id: chapter.id, label: `${chapter.title} cover`, field: \"coverAssetId\" });\n+    for (const block of chapter.blocks) for (const [field, value] of Object.entries(block.configuration)) if (value === assetId) usages.push({ type: \"block\", id: block.id, label: block.title, field });\n+  }\n+  for (const location of studio.locations) for (const field of [\"mapAssetId\", \"displayAssetId\"] as const) if (location[field] === assetId) usages.push({ type: \"location\", id: location.id, label: location.name, field });\n+  for (const artifact of studio.artifacts) for (const field of [\"artworkAssetId\", \"revealVideoAssetId\", \"modelAssetId\"] as const) if (artifact[field] === assetId) usages.push({ type: \"artifact\", id: artifact.id, label: artifact.name, field });\n+  return usages;\n+}\n+\n+export async function updateAsset(assetId: string, input: { displayName?: string; description?: string; tags?: string[]; roles?: string[]; collectionIds?: string[] }) {\n+  const asset = await db.taleAsset.findUniqueOrThrow({ where: { id: assetId } });\n+  return db.$transaction(async (tx) => {\n+    await tx.taleAsset.update({ where: { id: assetId }, data: { displayName: input.displayName?.trim() || undefined, description: input.description?.trim() || null } });\n+    if (input.tags) {\n+      await tx.taleAssetTagLink.deleteMany({ where: { assetId } });\n+      for (const name of [...new Set(input.tags.map((tag) => tag.trim().toLocaleLowerCase()).filter(Boolean))]) {\n+        const tag = await tx.taleAssetTag.upsert({ where: { taleId_name: { taleId: asset.taleId, name } }, update: {}, create: { taleId: asset.taleId, name } });\n+        await tx.taleAssetTagLink.create({ data: { assetId, tagId: tag.id } });\n+      }\n+    }\n+    if (input.roles) {\n+      await tx.taleAssetRole.deleteMany({ where: { assetId } });\n+      for (const role of [...new Set(input.roles)]) await tx.taleAssetRole.create({ data: { assetId, role } });\n+    }\n+    if (input.collectionIds) {\n+      await tx.taleAssetCollectionItem.deleteMany({ where: { assetId } });\n+      for (const collectionId of input.collectionIds) await tx.taleAssetCollectionItem.create({ data: { assetId, collectionId } });\n+    }\n+    return tx.taleAsset.findUniqueOrThrow({ where: { id: assetId }, include: { variants: true, tags: { include: { tag: true } }, roles: true, collectionItems: true } });\n+  });\n+}\n+\n+export async function archiveAsset(assetId: string) {\n+  const asset = await db.taleAsset.findUniqueOrThrow({ where: { id: assetId } });\n+  const usages = await assetUsages(asset.taleId, assetId);\n+  if (usages.length) return { archived: false, usages };\n+  await db.taleAsset.update({ where: { id: assetId }, data: { deletedAt: new Date() } });\n+  return { archived: true, usages: [] };\n+}\n+\n+export async function resolveAssetVariant(assetId: string, requestedRole: string, versionIdentity?: string) {\n+  let allowedVariantIds: Set<string> | null = null;\n+  if (versionIdentity && !versionIdentity.startsWith(\"draft:\")) {\n+    const version = await db.publishedTaleVersion.findUnique({ where: { id: versionIdentity } });\n+    if (!version) throw new Error(\"Published asset version not found.\");\n+    const asset = parsePublishedSnapshot(version.contentSnapshot).assets.find((item) => item.id === assetId);\n+    if (!asset) throw new Error(\"Asset is not part of this published version.\");\n+    allowedVariantIds = new Set(asset.variants?.map((variant) => variant.id) ?? []);\n+  }\n+  const candidates = await db.taleAssetVariant.findMany({ where: { assetId }, orderBy: { createdAt: \"desc\" } });\n+  const allowed = allowedVariantIds ? candidates.filter((candidate) => allowedVariantIds.has(candidate.id)) : candidates;\n+  const variant = allowed.find((candidate) => candidate.role === requestedRole) ?? allowed.find((candidate) => candidate.role === \"OPTIMIZED\") ?? allowed.find((candidate) => candidate.role === \"ORIGINAL\");\n+  if (!variant) throw new Error(\"Asset file is unavailable.\");\n+  return { variant, buffer: await readFile(keyPath(variant.storageKey)) };\n+}\n*** End Patch";

session has no pending verification to simulate.\");\n+    const key = body.idempotencyKey ?? randomUUID();\n+    const submission = { schemaVersion: 1 as const, eventId: randomUUID(), idempotencyKey: key, eventType: \"verification.result\" as const, providerType: \"visionLocation\" as const, providerInstanceId: \"development-simulator\", sessionId: body.scenario === \"wrongSession\" ? randomUUID() String(input.data.collectionType) : undefined } }));\n+    }\n+    if (input.entity === \"location\") {\n+      if (input.action === \"create\") {\n+        const name = String(input.data.name ?? \"New location\").trim();\n+        return NextResponse.json(await db.taleLocation.create({ data: { taleId, name, slug: slugify(String(input.data.slug ?? name)), region: String(input.data.region ?? \"\").trim() || null, playerFacingDescription: String(input.data.playerFacingDescription ?? \"\").trim() || null, captainNotes: String(input.data.captainNotes ?? \"\").trim() || null, referenceCollectionId: String(input.data.referenceCollectionId ?? \"\").trim() || null } }));\n+      }\n+      if (!input.id) throw new Error(\"Location ID required.\");\n+      if (input.action === \"archive\") return NextResponse.json(await db.taleLocation.update({ where: { id: input.id }, data: { archivedAt: new Date() } }));\n+      return NextResponse.json(await db.taleLocation.update({ where: { id: input.id }, data: { name: input.data.name ? String(input.data.name).trim() : undefined, shortDescription: input.data.shortDescription === undefined ? undefined : String(input.data.shortDescription).trim() || null, loreDescription: input.data.loreDescription === undefined ? undefined : String(input.data.loreDescription).trim() || null, ordinaryGameObjectLabel: input.data.ordinaryGameObjectLabel === undefined ? undefined : String(input.data.ordinaryGameObjectLabel).trim() || null, artworkAssetId: input.data.artworkAssetId === undefined ? undefined : String(input.data.artworkAssetId) || null, revealVideoAssetId: input.data.revealVideoAssetId === undefined ? undefined : String(input.data.revealVideoAssetId) || null, collectionGroup: input.data.collectionGroup === undefined ? undefined : String(input.data.collectionGroup).trim() || null } }));\n+  } catch (cause) {\n+    return apiError(cause);\n+  }\n+}\n*** End Patch";

chapters: Chapter[] };\n+\n+const clone = <T,>(value: T): T => structuredClone(value);\n+\n+export function TaleEditor({ taleId, initialSection = \"story\", authenticated }: { taleId: string; initialSection?: \"story\" | \"settings\" | \"assets\" | \"locations\" | \"artifacts\" | \"versions\"; return; }\n+    setData(body); setDraft({ tale: body.tale, chapters: body.draft.chapters }); setSaveState(`Saved at ${new Date(body.draft.savedAt).toLocaleTimeString()}`);\n+  }, [taleId]);\n+  useEffect(() => { if (authenticated) void load(); }, [authenticated, load]);\n+\n+  const save = useCallback(async (state: DraftState, quiet = true) => {\n+    if (!data || saving.current) return false;\n+    saving.current = true; setSaveState(\"Saving…\"); Date.now()).toLocaleTimeString()}`); return true;\n+  }, [data, taleId]);\n+  useEffect(() => { if (!draft || !dirty) return; const timer = setTimeout(() => void save(draft), 1100); return () => clearTimeout(timer); }, [draft, dirty, save]);\n+\n+  function change(mutator: (next: DraftState) => void) {\n+    if (!draft) return;\n+    const next = clone(draft); mutator(next); setPast((items) => [...items.slice(-24), draft]); setFuture([]); setDraft(next); setDirty(true); setSaveState(\"Unsaved changes\"); setValidation(null);\n+  }\n+  function undo() { if (!draft || !past.length) return; const previous = past.at(-1)!; setPast(past.slice(0, -1)); setFuture([draft, ...future]); setDraft(previous); setDirty(true); setSaveState(\"Unsaved changes\"); }\n+  function redo() { if (!draft || !future.length) return; const next = future[0]; setFuture(future.slice(1)); setPast([...past, draft]); setDraft(next); setDirty(true); setSaveState(\"Unsaved changes\"); }\n+\n+  const selected = useMemo(() => draft?.chapters.flatMap((chapter) => chapter.blocks.map((block) => ({ chapter, block }))).find((item) => item.block.id === selectedId) ?? null, [draft, selectedId]);\n+  const selectedDefinition = data?.registry.find((item) => item.type === selected?.block.blockType);\n+  const filteredAssets = useMemo(() => data?.assets.filter((asset) => `${asset.displayName} ${asset.tags.join(\" \")} ${asset.roles.join(\" \")}`.toLocaleLowerCase().includes(assetSearch.toLocaleLowerCase())) ?? next.chapters[chapterIndex].blocks.length, 0, { id, blockType: type, title: definition.defaultTitle, configuration: clone(definition.defaultConfiguration), presentation: {}, completion: {}, creatorNotes: \"\", isEnabled: true, schemaVersion: definition.schemaVersion }));\n+    setSelectedId(id);\n+  }\n+  function moveBlock(blockId: string, chapterIndex: number, blockIndex: number) {\n+    change((next) => { let found: Block | undefined; for (const chapter of next.chapters) { const index = chapter.blocks.findIndex((block) => block.id === blockId); if (index >= 0) found = chapter.blocks.splice(index, 1)[0]; } if (found) next.chapters[chapterIndex].blocks.splice(Math.min(blockIndex, next.chapters[chapterIndex].blocks.length), 0, found); });\n+  }\n+  function drop(event: React.DragEvent, chapterIndex: number, blockIndex: number) { event.preventDefault(); try { const payload = JSON.parse(event.dataTransfer.getData(\"application/x-tall-tale\")) as { kind: string; type?: string; id?: string }; if (payload.kind === \"library\" && payload.type) addBlock(payload.type, chapterIndex, blockIndex); if (payload.kind === \"block\" && payload.id) moveBlock(payload.id, chapterIndex, blockIndex); } catch {} }\n+  function updateSelected(mutator: (block: Block) => void) { if (!selectedId) return; change((next) => { const block = next.chapters.flatMap((chapter) => chapter.blocks).find((candidate) => candidate.id === selectedId); if (block) mutator(block); }); }\n+\n+  async function validate() { if (!draft || !data) return; if (dirty && !(await save(draft, false))) return; setSaveState(\"Validating…\"); const response = await fetch(`/api/studio/tales/${taleId}/validate`, { method: \"POST\", headers: { \"x-csrf-token\": data.csrfToken } }); const body = await response.json() as typeof validation & { error?: string }; if (!response.ok || !body) { setError(body?.error ?? \"Validation failed.\"); return; } setValidation(body); setSaveState(body.valid ? \"Draft validation passed\" : \"Draft validation failed\"); }\n+  async function publish() { if (!draft || !data) return; if (dirty && !(await save(draft, false))) return; const notes = window.prompt(\"Release notes for this immutable version:\", \"Phase 1 authoring release\"); if (notes === null || !window.confirm(\"Publish this saved draft as a new immutable player version?\")) return; setSaveState(\"Publishing…\"); const response = await fetch(`/api/studio/tales/${taleId}/publish`, { method: \"POST\", headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", \"x-csrf-token\": data.csrfToken }, body: JSON.stringify({ releaseNotes: notes, autosaveVersion: data.draft.autosaveVersion }) }); const body = await response.json() as { versionLabel?: string; validation?: typeof validation; error?: string }; if (!response.ok) { setError(body.error ?? \"Publishing failed.\"); if (body.validation) setValidation(body.validation); setSaveState(\"Publish failed\"); return; } setSaveState(`Published as version ${body.versionLabel}`); await load(); }\n+  async function preview(blockId?: string) { if (!draft || !data) return; if (dirty && !(await save(draft, false))) return; const response = await fetch(`/api/studio/tales/${taleId}/preview`, { method: \"POST\", headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", \"x-csrf-token\": data.csrfToken }, body: JSON.stringify({ blockId }) }); const body = await response.json() as { url?: string; error?: string }; if (!response.ok || !body.url) return setError(body.error ?? \"Preview could not be started.\"); window.open(body.url, \"_blank\", \"noopener,noreferrer\"); }\n+\n+  async function upload(files: FileList | null) { if (!files?.length || !data) return; const form = new FormData(); for (const file of Array.from(files)) form.append(\"files\", file); setSaveState(`Uploading ${files.length} file${files.length === 1 ? \"\" : \"s\"}…`); const response = await fetch(`/api/studio/tales/${taleId}/assets`, { method: \"POST\", headers: { \"x-csrf-token\": data.csrfToken }, body: form }); const body = await response.json() as { error?: string }; if (!response.ok) { setError(body.error ?? \"Upload failed.\"); setSaveState(\"Upload failed\"); return; } await load(); setAssetDrawer(true); }\n+\n+  async function libraryAction(entity: \"collection\" | \"location\" | \"artifact\", action: \"create\" | \"archive\", id?: string) { if (!data) return; let values: JsonObject = {}; if (action === \"create\") { const name = window.prompt(`Name the new ${entity}:`); if (!name) return; values = { name }; if (entity === \"location\") values.region = window.prompt(\"Region (optional):\") ?? \"\"; if (entity === \"artifact\") values.ordinaryGameObjectLabel = window.prompt(\"Ordinary in-game object (optional):\") ?? \"\"; } else if (!window.confirm(`Archive this ${entity}?`)) return; const response = await fetch(`/api/studio/tales/${taleId}/library`, { method: \"POST\", headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", \"x-csrf-token\": data.csrfToken }, body: JSON.stringify({ entity, action, id, data: values }) }); const body = await response.json() as { error?: string }; if (!response.ok) return setError(body.error ?? \"Library update failed.\"); await load(); }\n+\n+  if (!authenticated) return <main className=\"studio-auth-gate\"><section><h1>Creator authentication required</h1><Link className=\"brass-button\" href=\"/quartermaster\">Open Quartermaster login</Link></section></main>;\n+  if (!data || !draft) return <main className=\"studio-loading\">{error || \"Unrolling the Tall Tale chart…\"}</main>;\n+\n+  const nav = ([\"story\", \"settings\", \"assets\", \"locations\", \"artifacts\", \"versions\"] as const);\n+  return (\n+    <main className=\"tale-editor\">\n+      <header className=\"editor-topbar\">\n+        <div><Link href=\"/studio\">← Studio</Link><span className=\"draft-mark\">Draft</span><h1>{draft.tale.title}</h1></div>\n+        <div className=\"editor-history\"><button disabled={!past.length} onClick={undo} aria-label=\"Undo last edit\">↶ Undo</button><button disabled={!future.length} onClick={redo} aria-label=\"Redo edit\">↷ Redo</button></div>\n+        <p className={`save-state ${saveState.includes(\"failed\") || saveState.includes(\"Conflict\") ? \"error\" : \"\"}`} role=\"status\" aria-live=\"polite\">{saveState}</p>\n+        <div className=\"editor-primary-actions\"><button onClick={() => void preview()}>Preview</button><button disabled={!selected} onClick={() => void preview(selected?.block.id)}>Play From Here</button><button onClick={() => void validate()}>Validate</button><button className=\"publish-button\" onClick={() => void publish()}>Publish</button></div>\n+      </header>\n+      <nav className=\"editor-section-nav\" aria-label=\"Tall Tale authoring sections\">{nav.map((item) => <Link key={item} className={initialSection === item ? `Simulator accepted the ${simResult} event${scenario === \"duplicate\" ? \" and safely deduplicated its replay\" : \"\"}.` : `${body.error ?? \"Simulator event rejected.\"} (${body.code ?? \"rejected\"})`); await load(); setBusy(false); }\n+  if (!authenticated) return <main className=\"captain-auth\"><section><h1>Captain authentication required</h1><Link href=\"/quartermaster\">Open Quartermaster login</Link></section></main>;\n+  if (!state) return <main className=\"captain-session loading\"><p role=\"status\">{error || \"Opening the audited session ledger…\"}</p></main>;\n+  return <main className=\"captain-session\"><header><div><Link href=\"/captain\">← All sessions</Link><p className=\"eyebrow\">{state.session.previewMode ? \"Preview session\" : `Pinned ${state.session.versionId.slice(0, 12)}`}</p><h1>{state.tale.title}</h1><p>{state.session.ownerLabel} · {state.session.status.toLocaleLowerCase()} · sequence {state.session.currentSequence}</p></div><span className=\"polling-state\"><i />Canonical state · 2s polling</span></header>{error && <div className=\"captain-notice\" role=\"status\"><span>{error}</span><button onClick={() => setError(\"\")}>Dismiss</button></div>}<div className=\"session-control-grid\"><section className=\"current-state\"><p className=\"card-kicker\">Player&apos;s present position</p><h2>{state.chapter?.title}</h2><h3>{state.block?.title}</h3><span>{state.block?.blockType}</span><p>{String(state.block?.configuration.prompt ?? state.block?.configuration.heading ?? state.block?.configuration.body ?? \"No player summary configured.\")}</p>{state.block?.creatorNotes && <aside><strong>Private creator note</strong><p>{state.block.creatorNotes}</p></aside>}<div className={`pending-request ${state.pendingVerification ? \"active\" : \"quiet\"}`}><strong>{state.pendingVerification ? `Pending ${state.pendingVerification.providerType}` : \"No pending verification\"}</strong>{state.pendingVerification && <span>Waiting since {new Date(state.pendingVerification.requestedAt).toLocaleTimeString()}</span>}</div></section><section className=\"captain-actions\"><p className=\"card-kicker\">Authorized controls</p><div>{state.pendingVerification && <><button className=\"approve\" disabled={busy} onClick={() => void action(\"approve\")}>Approve verification</button><button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void action(\"reject\")}>Reject / request retry</button><button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void action(\"override\")}>Explicit override</button></>}<button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void action(state.session.status === \"PAUSED\" ? \"resume\" : \"pause\")}>{state.session.status === \"PAUSED\" ? \"Resume\" : \"Pause\"} session</button><button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void action(\"presentation\")}>Re-trigger presentation</button><button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void action(\"releaseHint\")}>Release hint</button><button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void action(\"rollback\")}>Rollback to prior safe block</button></div><label><span>Jump target</span><select value={jumpTarget} onChange={(event) => setJumpTarget(event.target.value)}><option value=\"\">Choose block</option>{state.chapters?.map((chapter) => <optgroup key={chapter.id} label={chapter.title}>{chapter.blocks.map((block) => <option key={block.id} value={block.id}>{block.title} · {block.blockType}</option>)}</optgroup>)}</select></label><button disabled={busy || !jumpTarget} onClick={() => void action(\"jump\", { targetBlockId: jumpTarget })}>Jump with audit reason</button></section><section className=\"session-debug\"><p className=\"card-kicker\">Inventory and variables</p><h3>Inventory</h3><ul>{state.inventory.length ? state.inventory.map((item) => <li key={item}>{item}</li>) : <li>Empty</li>}</ul><h3>Variables</h3><pre>{JSON.stringify(state.variables ?? {}, null, 2)}</pre></section><section className=\"event-ledger\"><p className=\"card-kicker\">Recent event history</p><ol>{state.events.map((event) => <li key={event.id}><span>{event.sequence}</span><div><strong>{event.eventType}</strong><small>{event.sourceType} · {new Date(event.createdAt).toLocaleTimeString()}</small></div></li>)}</ol></section>{process.env.NODE_ENV !== \"production\" && <section className=\"verification-simulator\"><p className=\"card-kicker\">Development tool · future provider seam</p><h2>Verification Simulator</h2><p>Submits standardized evidence against the current pending request. It cannot issue an unrestricted advance command.</p><label><span>Outcome</span><select value={simResult} onChange={(event) => setSimResult(event.target.value)}><option value=\"match\">Match</option><option value=\"notMatch\">Not match</option><option value=\"uncertain\">Uncertain</option></select></label><label><span>Confidence {confidence.toFixed(2)}</span><input type=\"range\" min={0} max={1} step={0.01} value={confidence} onChange={(event) => setConfidence(Number(event.target.value))} /></label><div><button disabled={busy || !state.pendingVerification} onClick={() => void simulate()}>Submit simulated outcome</button><button disabled={busy || !state.pendingVerification} onClick={() => void simulate(\"duplicate\")}>Test duplicate</button><button disabled={busy || !state.pendingVerification} onClick={() => void simulate(\"stale\")}>Test stale</button><button disabled={busy || !state.pendingVerification} onClick={() => void simulate(\"wrongBlock\")}>Test wrong block</button><button disabled={busy || !state.pendingVerification} onClick={() => void simulate(\"wrongVersion\")}>Test wrong version</button></div></section>}</div></main>;\n+}\n*** Add File: \\\\gwplastics.com\\VT\\Users\\kgray\\My Documents\\treasurehunt\\forever-treasure-companion\\src\\app\\captain\\page.tsx\n+import { CaptainDashboard } from \"@/components/captain/CaptainDashboard\";\n+import { requireGmCapability } from \"@/lib/security\";\n+export const dynamic = \"force-dynamic\";\n+export default async function CaptainPage() { return <CaptainDashboard authenticated={Boolean(await requireGmCapability(\"CAPTAIN\"))} />; border-radius: 10px; padding: .7rem; background: rgba(66,46,18,.62); }\n+.session-control-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.1fr .9fr; gap: .8rem; max-width: 1500px; margin: 1rem auto; }\n+.session-control-grid > section { border: 1px solid rgba(201,169,95,.22); border-radius: 16px; padding: 1.2rem; background: rgba(8,29,31,.88); }\n+.current-state h2 { margin-bottom: .2rem; font-size: 2.3rem; }\n+.current-state h3 { color: var(--brass-100); }\n+.current-state > span { border: 1px solid rgba(201,169,95,.25); border-radius: 999px; padding: .25rem .5rem; font-size: .68rem; }\n+.current-state aside { margin-top: 1rem; border-left: 3px solid var(--brass-300); padding: .8rem; background: rgba(201,169,95,.08); }\n+.pending-request { margin-top: 1rem; border-radius: 10px; padding: .8rem; }\n+.pending-request.active { color: #f4db9f; background: rgba(130,86,17,.28); }\n+.pending-request.quiet { color: #8fa59f; background: rgba(255,255,255,.03); }\n+.pending-request strong,\n+.pending-request span { display: block; }\n+.captain-actions > div,\n+.verification-simulator > div { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: .45rem; }\n+.captain-actions button { border-radius: 8px; }\n+.captain-actions .approve { color: #07120d; background: #8bd1ad; font-weight: 850; }\n+.captain-actions label { display: block; margin: 1rem 0 .5rem; }\n+.session-debug pre { overflow: auto; max-height: 220px; border-radius: 9px; padding: .8rem; color: #b4d2c8; background: #030d0f; }\n+.event-ledger ol { max-height: 380px; overflow: auto; padding: 0; list-style: none; }\n+.event-ledger li { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 34px 1fr; gap: .6rem; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,169,95,.14); padding: .55rem; }\n+.event-ledger li > span { color: var(--brass-100); }\n+.event-ledger strong,\n+.event-ledger small { display: block; }\n+.event-ledger small { color: #829891; }\n+.verification-simulator { grid-column: 1 / -1; border-style: dashed !important; border-color: rgba(105,169,194,.5) !important; }\n+.verification-simulator label { display: inline-block; min-width: 220px; margin: .4rem 1rem .8rem 0; }\n+.verification-simulator label span { display: block; margin-bottom: .3rem; color: #a8c8d4; }\n+\n+@media (max-width: 850px) {\n+  .tale-catalog > header { display: block; }\n+  .tale-catalog > header > a { display: inline-block; margin: .5rem; }\n+  .tale-start form,\n+  .player-runtime > header,\n+  .captain-dashboard > header,\n+  .captain-session > header { align-items: stretch; flex-direction: column; }\n+  .runtime-actions form { align-items: stretch; flex-direction: column; }\n+  .choice-actions { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n+  .captain-summary { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }\n+  .captain-layout,\n+  .session-control-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n+  .captain-layout > aside { display: none; }\n+  .verification-simulator { grid-column: auto; }\n+}\n*** End Patch";
text(await tools.apply_patch(patch));

Reinstall Node.js with npm included and try again.\"\n}\n\nfunction Invoke-ForeverNpm {\n    param([Parameter(Mandatory)][string]$WorkingDirectory, [Parameter(ValueFromRemainingArguments)][string[]]$Arguments)\n    $invocation = Get-ForeverNpmInvocation\n    $previousPath = $env:PATH\n    $env:PATH = \"$(Split-Path (Get-ForeverNode));$env:PATH\"\n    Push-Location $WorkingDirectory\n    try {\n        & $invocation.File @($invocation.Prefix) @Arguments | Out-Host\n        if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw \"npm command failed with exit code ${LASTEXITCODE}: npm $($Arguments -join ' ')\" }\n    } finally { Pop-Location; $env:PATH = $previousPath }\n}\n\nfunction Ensure-ForeverEnvironment {\n    $environmentPath = Join-Path $script:ProjectRoot \".env\"\n    if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $environmentPath)) {\n        $bytes = New-Object byte[] 48\n        [Security.Cryptography.RandomNumberGenerator]::Create().GetBytes($bytes)\n        $secret = [Convert]::ToBase64String($bytes)\n        @\"\n# Local disposable development configuration. Never use these credentials in production.\nDATABASE_URL=\"file:./dev.db\"\nSESSION_SECRET=\"$secret\"\nGM_USERNAME=\"kato\"\nGM_PASSWORD=\"development-captain-only\"\nPLAYER_ACCESS_CODE=\"development-moonwake\"\nNEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL=\"http://127.0.0.1:3000\"\nLOG_LEVEL=\"info\"\n\"@ | Set-Content -LiteralPath $environmentPath -Encoding UTF8\n        Write-Host \"Created ignored local development configuration at $environmentPath\" -ForegroundColor DarkGray\n    }\n    $required = \"DATABASE_URL\", \"SESSION_SECRET\", \"GM_USERNAME\", \"GM_PASSWORD\", \"PLAYER_ACCESS_CODE\"\n    $contents = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $environmentPath\n    foreach ($name in $required) {\n        if ($contents -notmatch \"(?m)^$name=\") { throw \".env exists but is missing $name. It was preserved; add the missing value and retry.\" }\n    }\n    return $environmentPath\n}\n\nfunction Import-ForeverEnvironment {\n    param([Parameter(Mandatory)][string]$Path)\n    foreach ($line in Get-Content -LiteralPath $Path) {\n        if ($line -match '^\\s*#' -or $line -notmatch '=') { continue }\n        $name, $value = $line -split '=', 2\n        $value = $value.Trim().Trim('\"').Trim(\"'\")\n        [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable($name.Trim(), $value, \"Process\")\n    }\n}\n\nfunction Sync-ForeverRuntime {\n    param([ValidateSet(\"development\", \"validation\")][string]$Mode = \"development\")\n    $isNetworkPath = $script:ProjectRoot.StartsWith(\"\\\\\")\n    if (-not $isNetworkPath -and $Mode -eq \"development\") { return $script:ProjectRoot }\n    $runtimeRoot = Join-Path $script:RuntimeBase $Mode\n    if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $runtimeRoot)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $runtimeRoot -Force | Out-Null }\n    $resolvedBase = (Resolve-Path $script:RuntimeBase).ProviderPath\n    $resolvedRuntime = (Resolve-Path $runtimeRoot).ProviderPath\n    if (-not $resolvedRuntime.StartsWith($resolvedBase, [StringComparison]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)) { throw \"Unsafe runtime mirror path.\" }\n    & robocopy $script:ProjectRoot $runtimeRoot /MIR /XD .git .forever node_modules node_modules.failed .next artifacts coverage test-results playwright-report /XF *.db *.db-journal *.log .forever-dev.json .forever-lock.sha | Out-Null\n    if ($LASTEXITCODE -gt 7) { throw \"Unable to synchronize the local runtime mirror (robocopy exit $LASTEXITCODE).\" }\n    return $runtimeRoot\n}\n\nfunction Install-ForeverDependencies {\n    param([Parameter(Mandatory)][string]$RuntimeRoot)\n    $lock = Join-Path $RuntimeRoot \"package-lock.json\"\n    $hash = (Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 -LiteralPath $lock).Hash\n    $marker = Join-Path $RuntimeRoot \".forever-lock.sha\"\n    $installed = Test-Path (Join-Path $RuntimeRoot \"node_modules\\next\\package.json\")\n    $currentHash = if (Test-Path $marker) { (Get-Content -Raw $marker).Trim() } else { \"\" }\n    if (-not $installed -or $currentHash -ne $hash) {\n        Write-Host \"Installing pinned dependencies...\" -ForegroundColor Cyan\n        Invoke-ForeverNpm -WorkingDirectory $RuntimeRoot -Arguments @(\"ci\", \"--no-audit\", \"--no-fund\")\n        Set-Content -LiteralPath $marker -Value $hash -Encoding ASCII\n    } else { Write-Host \"Dependencies are current.\" -ForegroundColor DarkGray }\n}\n\nfunction Invoke-ForeverNode {\n    param([Parameter(Mandatory)][string]$WorkingDirectory, [Parameter(ValueFromRemainingArguments)][string[]]$Arguments)\n    Push-Location $WorkingDirectory\n    try {\n        & (Get-ForeverNode) @Arguments | Out-Host\n        if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw \"Node command failed with exit code $LASTEXITCODE.\" }\n    } finally { Pop-Location }\n}\n\nfunction Initialize-ForeverRuntime {\n    param([ValidateSet(\"development\", \"validation\")][string]$Mode = \"development\", [switch]$ResetDatabase)\n    $environmentPath = Ensure-ForeverEnvironment\n    $runtimeRoot = Sync-ForeverRuntime -Mode $Mode\n    Install-ForeverDependencies -RuntimeRoot $runtimeRoot\n    $runtimeEnvironment = Join-Path $runtimeRoot \".env\"\n    Import-ForeverEnvironment -Path $runtimeEnvironment\n    if ($Mode -eq \"validation\") { $env:DATABASE_URL = \"file:./validation.db\" }\n    $databaseName = if ($Mode -eq \"validation\") { \"validation.db\" } else { \"dev.db\" }\n    $databasePath = Join-Path $runtimeRoot \"prisma\\$databaseName\"\n    if ($ResetDatabase -and (Test-Path $databasePath)) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $databasePath -Force }\n    if (-not (Test-Path $databasePath)) { New-Item -ItemType File -Path $databasePath | Out-Null }\n    Write-Host \"Generating the database client...\" -ForegroundColor Cyan\n    Invoke-ForeverNode -WorkingDirectory $runtimeRoot -Arguments @(\"node_modules/prisma/build/index.js\", \"generate\", \"--schema\", \"prisma/schema.sqlite.prisma\")\n \"deploy\", \"--schema\", \"prisma/schema.sqlite.prisma\")\n    Write-Host \"Verifying development seed data...\" -ForegroundColor Cyan\n    Invoke-ForeverNode -WorkingDirectory $runtimeRoot $deadline = (Get-Date).AddSeconds($Seconds)\n    do {\n        try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri $Url -TimeoutSec 2; if ($response.StatusCode -lt 500) { return } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 }\n    } while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline)\n    throw \"The application did not become ready at $Url within $Seconds seconds.\"\n}\n\r\nparam([switch]$SkipBrowserInstall)\n$ErrorActionPreference = \"Stop\"\n. (Join-Path $PSScriptRoot \"dev-common.ps1\")\n\n$runtimeRoot = Initialize-ForeverRuntime -Mode validation -ResetDatabase\n$nextCache = Join-Path $runtimeRoot \".next\"\nif (Test-Path -LiteralPath $nextCache) {\n    $resolvedRuntime = [System.IO.Path]::GetFullPath($runtimeRoot)\n    $resolvedCache = [System.IO.Path]::GetFullPath($nextCache)\n    if (-not $resolvedCache.StartsWith($resolvedRuntime, [System.StringComparison]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)) { throw \"Unsafe validation cache path.\" }\n    Remove-Item -LiteralPath $resolvedCache -Recurse [System.IO.Path]::GetFullPath($runtimeRoot)\n    $resolvedArtifacts = [System.IO.Path]::GetFullPath($validationArtifacts)\n    if (-not $resolvedArtifacts.StartsWith($resolvedRuntime, Get-ForeverNode\n$nodeDirectory = Split-Path $node\n$env:PATH = \"$nodeDirectory;$env:PATH\"\n$env:PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL = \"http://127.0.0.1:3100\"\nif (-not $env:GM_USERNAME) { $env:GM_USERNAME = \"kato\" }\nif (-not $env:GM_PASSWORD) { $env:GM_PASSWORD = \"development-captain-only\" }\nif (-not $env:PLAYER_ACCESS_CODE) { $env:PLAYER_ACCESS_CODE = \"development-moonwake\" }\n$env:VALIDATION_ARTIFACTS = Join-Path $runtimeRoot \"artifacts\\validation\"\n\nfunction Invoke-ValidationStep {\n    param([Parameter(Mandatory)][string]$Name, [Parameter(Mandatory)][string[]]$Arguments)\n    Write-Host \"`n==> $Name\" -ForegroundColor Cyan\n    Invoke-ForeverNode -WorkingDirectory $runtimeRoot -Arguments $Arguments\n}\n\nif (-not $SkipBrowserInstall) {\n    Invoke-ValidationStep -Name \"Installing Playwright browsers\" -Arguments @(\"node_modules/playwright/cli.js\", \"install\", \"chromium\", \"webkit\")\n}\nInvoke-ValidationStep -Name \"Checking formatting\" -Arguments @(\"node_modules/prettier/bin/prettier.cjs\", \"--check\", \".\")\nInvoke-ValidationStep -Name \"Linting\" -Arguments @(\"node_modules/eslint/bin/eslint.js\", \".\")\nInvoke-ValidationStep -Name \"Type checking\" -Arguments @(\"node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc\", \"--noEmit\")\nInvoke-ValidationStep -Name \"Running
