\"This chart cannot be opened.\");\r\n      else setTale(body.tale ?? null);\r\n    });\r\n  }, [taleSlug]);\r\n  if (error)\r\n    return (\r\n      <main className=\"tale-start error\">\r\n        <section>\r\n          <h1>Chart unavailable</h1>\r\n          <p>{error}</p>\r\n          <Link href=\"/tales\">Return to the catalog</Link>\r\n        </section>\r\n      </main>\r\n    );\r\n  if (!tale)\r\n    return (\r\n      <main className=\"tale-start\">\r\n        <p role=\"status\">Unrolling the published chartâ€¦</p>\r\n      </main>\r\n    );\r\n  return (\r\n    <main className=\"tale-start\">\r\n      {tale.coverUrl && <img className=\"tale-start-cover\" src={tale.coverUrl} alt=\"\" />}\r\n      <div className=\"tale-start-shade\" />\r\n      <section>\r\n        <Link href=\"/tales\">â† Published tales</Link>\r\n        <p className=\"eyebrow\">\r\n          Version {tale.version} Â· {tale.estimatedDuration ? `${tale.estimatedDuration} minutes` : \"duration uncharted\"}\r\n        </p>\r\n        <h1>{tale.title}</h1>\r\n        <h2>{tale.subtitle}</h2>\r\n        <p>{tale.longDescription ?? tale.shortDescription}</p>\r\n        <dl>\r\n          <div>\r\n            <dt>Crew</dt>\r\n            <dd>\r\n              {tale.playerCountMin}â€“{tale.playerCountMax} players\r\n            </dd>\r\n          </div>\r\n          {tale.contentWarnings && (\r\n            <div>\r\n              <dt>Notes</dt>\r\n              <dd>{tale.contentWarnings}</dd>\r\n            </div>\r\n          )}\r\n        </dl>\r\n        <form\r\n          onSubmit={async (event) => {\r\n            event.preventDefault();\r\n            setBusy(true);\r\n            setError(\"\");\r\n            const response = await fetch(`/api/tales/${taleSlug}/start`, {\r\n              method: \"POST\",\r\n              headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\r\n              body: JSON.stringify({ ownerLabel: label }),\r\n            });\r\n            const body = (await response.json()) as { url?: string; error?: string };\r\n            if (!response.ok || !body.url) {\r\n              setError(body.error ?? \"The voyage could not begin.\");\r\n              setBusy(false);\r\n              return;\r\n            }\r\n            router.push(body.url);\r\n          }}\r\n        >\r\n          <label>\r\n            <span>Crew or player name</span>\r\n            <input\r\n              value={label}\r\n              onChange={(event) => setLabel(event.target.value)}\r\n              placeholder=\"Guest crew\"\r\n              maxLength={120}\r\n            />\r\n          </label>\r\n          <button className=\"brass-button\" disabled={busy}>\r\n            {busy ? \"Preparing the sessionâ€¦\" : \"Begin this Tall Tale\"}\r\n          </button>\r\n          {error && <p role=\"alert\">{error}</p>}\r\n        </form>\r\n      </section>\r\n    </main>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n\"use client\";\r\n\r\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\r\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \"react\";\r\nimport { PublishedBlockView } from \"@/components/tales/PublishedBlockView\";\r\nimport type { JsonObject } from \"@/tall-tale/types\";\r\n\r\ntype State = {\r\n  session: {\r\n    id: string;\r\n    status: string;\r\n    previewMode: boolean;\r\n    versionId: string;\r\n    currentSequence: number;\r\n    completedAt: string | null;\r\n  };\r\n  tale: { title: string; slug: string };\r\n  chapter: { title: string; orderIndex: number } | null;\r\n  block: {\r\n    id: string;\r\n    blockType: string;\r\n    title: string;\r\n    configuration: JsonObject;\r\n    connections: Array<{ targetBlockId: string; connectionType: string; label?: string | null }>;\r\n  } | null;\r\n  pendingVerification: { id: string; providerType: string; expiresAt: string | null } | null;\r\n  assets: Array<{ id: string; displayName: string; url: string }>;\r\n};\r\n\r\nexport function PlayerRuntime({ sessionId }: { sessionId: string }) {\r\n  const [state, setState] = useState<State | null>(null);\r\n  const [answer, setAnswer] = useState(\"\");\r\n  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);\r\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\r\n  const [connected, setConnected] = useState(false);\r\n  const [now, setNow] = useState(0);\r\n  const load = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    const response = await fetch(`/api/play/sessions/${sessionId}`, { cache: \"no-store\" });\r\n    const body = (await response.json()) as State & { error?: string };\r\n    if (!response.ok) setError(body.error ?? \"The voyage state could not be read.\");\r\n    else {\r\n      setState(body);\r\n      setError(\"\");\r\n    }\r\n  }, [sessionId]);\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    queueMicrotask(() => {\r\n      setNow(Date.now());\r\n      void load();\r\n    });\r\n    const source = new EventSource(`/api/play/sessions/${sessionId}/events`);\r\n    source.onopen = () => setConnected(true);\r\n    source.onerror = () => setConnected(false);\r\n    source.addEventListener(\"progression\", () => void load());\r\n    const timer = setInterval(() => setNow(Date.now()), 500);\r\n    return () => {\r\n      source.close();\r\n      clearInterval(timer);\r\n    };\r\n  }, [load, sessionId]);\r\n  const waitRemaining = useMemo(\r\n    () => Math.max(0, Date.parse(state?.pendingVerification?.expiresAt ?? \"\") - now),\r\n    [now, state],\r\n  );\r\n  async function act(action: \"continue\" | \"confirm\" | \"answer\" | \"choice\" | \"timer\", extra: JsonObject = {}) {\r\n    setBusy(true);\r\n    setError(\"\");\r\n    const response = await fetch(`/api/play/sessions/${sessionId}`, {\r\n      method: \"POST\",\r\n      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\r\n      body: JSON.stringify({ action, idempotencyKey: crypto.randomUUID(), answer, ...extra }),\r\n    });\r\n    const body = (await response.json()) as { state?: State; accepted?: boolean; error?: string };\r\n    if (!response.ok) setError(body.error ?? \"The story could not advance.\");\r\n    else if (body.state) {\r\n      setState(body.state);\r\n      if (body.accepted) setAnswer(\"\");\r\n    }\r\n    setBusy(false);\r\n  }\r\n  if (!state)\r\n    return (\r\n      <main className=\"player-runtime loading\">\r\n        <p role=\"status\">{error || \"Finding the current mark on the chartâ€¦\"}</p>\r\n      </main>\r\n    );\r\n  const choices =\r\n    state.block?.blockType === \"choice\" && Array.isArray(state.block.configuration.choices)\r\n      ? (state.block.configuration.choices as Array<Record<string, unknown>>)\r\n      : [];\r\n  return (\r\n    <main className={`player-runtime ${state.session.previewMode ? \"preview-mode\" : \"\"}`}>\r\n      <header>\r\n        <div>\r\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">\r\n            {state.session.previewMode ? \"Preview Mode â€” no real progress\" : (state.chapter?.title ?? \"Tall Tale\")}\r\n          </p>\r\n          <h1>{state.tale.title}</h1>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div className={`runtime-connection ${connected ? \"connected\" : \"reconnecting\"}`}>\r\n          <i />\r\n          {connected ? \"Captain channel connected\" : \"Reconnecting to canonical state\"}\r\n        </div>\r\n      </header>\r\n      <section className=\"runtime-stage\">\r\n        {state.block ? (\r\n          <PublishedBlockView block={state.block} assets={state.assets} />\r\n        ) : (\r\n          <article className=\"runtime-block unknown-block\">\r\n            <h2>No safe story block is available.</h2>\r\n          </article>\r\n        )}\r\n        <div className=\"runtime-actions\" aria-live=\"polite\">\r\n          {state.session.status === \"COMPLETED\" ? (\r\n            <>\r\n              <strong>This Tall Tale is complete.</strong>\r\n              <Link className=\"brass-button\" href={`/play/${state.tale.slug}/history`}>\r\n                View voyage history\r\n              </Link>\r\n              <Link href=\"/tales\">Choose another tale</Link>\r\n            </>\r\n          ) : state.pendingVerification?.providerType === \"captainManual\" ? (\r\n            <div className=\"awaiting-captain\">\r\n              <span>â—·</span>\r\n              <strong>{String(state.block?.configuration.waitingText ?? \"Awaiting the Captain's approvalâ€¦\")}</strong>\r\n              <p>The player view will update automatically when the Captain responds.</p>\r\n            </div>\r\n          ) : state.pendingVerification?.providerType === \"textAnswer\" ? (\r\n            <form\r\n              onSubmit={(event) => {\r\n                event.preventDefault();\r\n                void act(\"answer\");\r\n              }}\r\n            >\r\n              <label>\r\n                <span>Your answer</span>\r\n                <input value={answer} onChange={(event) => setAnswer(event.target.value)} autoComplete=\"off\" required />\r\n              </label>\r\n              <button className=\"brass-button\" disabled={busy}>\r\n                {busy ? \"Testing the answerâ€¦\" : \"Submit answer\"}\r\n              </button>\r\n            </form>\r\n          ) : state.pendingVerification?.providerType === \"timer\" ? (\r\n            <button className=\"brass-button\" disabled={busy || waitRemaining > 0} onClick={() => void act(\"timer\")}>\r\n              {waitRemaining > 0 ? `Continue in ${Math.ceil(waitRemaining / 1000)}s` : \"Continue\"}\r\n            </button>\r\n          ) : choices.length ? (\r\n            <div className=\"choice-actions\">\r\n              <p>{String(state.block?.configuration.prompt ?? \"Choose a course.\")}</p>\r\n              {choices.map((choice) => (\r\n                <button\r\n                  key={String(choice.id ?? choice.label)}\r\n                  disabled={busy || !choice.targetBlockId}\r\n                  onClick={() => void act(\"choice\", { targetBlockId: choice.targetBlockId })}\r\n                >\r\n                  <strong>{String(choice.label ?? \"Choice\")}</strong>\r\n                  {Boolean(choice.description) && <span>{String(choice.description)}</span>}\r\n                </button>\r\n              ))}\r\n            </div>\r\n          ) : (\r\n            <button\r\n              className=\"brass-button\"\r\n              disabled={busy || state.block?.blockType === \"condition\" || state.block?.blockType === \"setVariable\"}\r\n              onClick={() => void act(\"continue\")}\r\n            >\r\n              {busy\r\n                ? \"Writing progressâ€¦\"\r\n                : String(\r\n                    state.block?.configuration.buttonLabel ?? state.block?.configuration.primaryLabel ?? \"Continue\",\r\n                  )}\r\n            </button>\r\n          )}\r\n          {error && (\r\n            <p className=\"runtime-error\" role=\"alert\">\r\n              {error}\r\n            </p>\r\n          )}\r\n        </div>\r\n      </section>\r\n      <footer>\r\n        <span>\r\n          Version {state.session.versionId.startsWith(\"draft:\") ? \"draft preview\" : state.session.versionId.slice(0, 8)}\r\n        </span>\r\n        <span>Event sequence {state.session.currentSequence}</span>\r\n      </footer>\r\n    </main>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n\"use client\";\r\n\r\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\r\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \"react\";\r\n\r\ntype Session = {\r\n  id: string;\r\n  taleId: string;\r\n  taleTitle: string;\r\n  versionLabel: string;\r\n  ownerLabel: string | null;\r\n  status: string;\r\n  previewMode: boolean;\r\n  currentBlockId: string | null;\r\n  pendingVerification: { providerType: string; requestedAt: string } | null;\r\n  lastEventAt: string;\r\n  connected: boolean;\r\n};\r\ntype Tale = { id: string; slug: string; title: string; status: string; visibility: string };\r\n\r\nexport function CaptainDashboard({ authenticated, taleFilter }: { authenticated: boolean; taleFilter?: string }) {\r\n  const [sessions, setSessions] = useState<Session[]>([]);\r\n  const [tales, setTales] = useState<Tale[]>([]);\r\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\r\n  const [clock, setClock] = useState(0);\r\n  const load = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    const response = await fetch(\"/api/captain/sessions\", { cache: \"no-store\" });\r\n    const body = (await response.json()) as { sessions?: Session[]; tales?: Tale[]; error?: string };\r\n    if (!response.ok) setError(body.error ?? \"The Captain ledger is unavailable.\");\r\n    else {\r\n      setSessions(body.sessions ?? []);\r\n      setTales(body.tales ?? []);\r\n      setError(\"\");\r\n    }\r\n  }, []);\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    if (!authenticated) return;\r\n    queueMicrotask(() => {\r\n      setClock(Date.now());\r\n      void load();\r\n    });\r\n    const timer = setInterval(() => {\r\n      setClock(Date.now());\r\n      void load();\r\n    }, 2500);\r\n    return () => clearInterval(timer);\r\n  }, [authenticated, load]);\r\n  const shown = useMemo(\r\n    () => (taleFilter ? sessions.filter((session) => session.taleId === taleFilter) : sessions),\r\n    [sessions, taleFilter],\r\n  );\r\n  if (!authenticated)\r\n    return (\r\n      <main className=\"captain-auth\">\r\n        <section>\r\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">Captain control</p>\r\n          <h1>The command cabin is locked.</h1>\r\n          <p>Sign in through the Quartermaster&apos;s Log, then return to active Tall Tale sessions.</p>\r\n          <Link className=\"brass-button\" href=\"/quartermaster\">\r\n            Open Quartermaster login\r\n          </Link>\r\n        </section>\r\n      </main>\r\n    );\r\n  return (\r\n    <main className=\"captain-dashboard\">\r\n      <header>\r\n        <div>\r\n          <Link href=\"/\">â† Harbor</Link>\r\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">Authoritative session control</p>\r\n          <h1>Captain&apos;s Tall Tale Desk</h1>\r\n          <p>State refreshes from the server every 2.5 seconds. Progression actions remain idempotent and audited.</p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <nav>\r\n          <Link href=\"/studio\">Tall Tale Studio</Link>\r\n          <Link href=\"/tales\">Player catalog</Link>\r\n        </nav>\r\n      </header>\r\n      {error && (\r\n        <p role=\"alert\" className=\"captain-error\">\r\n          {error}\r\n        </p>\r\n      )}\r\n      <section className=\"captain-summary\">\r\n        <article>\r\n          <strong>{shown.filter((session) => session.status === \"ACTIVE\" && !session.previewMode).length}</strong>\r\n          <span>active voyages</span>\r\n        </article>\r\n        <article>\r\n          <strong>{shown.filter((session) => session.pendingVerification && !session.previewMode).length}</strong>\r\n          <span>awaiting verification</span>\r\n        </article>\r\n        <article>\r\n          <strong>{shown.filter((session) => session.previewMode).length}</strong>\r\n          <span>preview sessions</span>\r\n        </article>\r\n        <article className=\"live-poll\">\r\n          <i />\r\n          <strong>Live</strong>\r\n          <span>canonical polling</span>\r\n        </article>\r\n      </section>\r\n      <div className=\"captain-layout\">\r\n        <aside>\r\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">Available Tall Tales</p>\r\n          {tales.map((tale) => (\r\n            <Link className={tale.id === taleFilter ? \"active\" : \"\"} key={tale.id} href={`/captain/tales/${tale.id}`}>\r\n              <strong>{tale.title}</strong>\r\n              <span>\r\n                {tale.visibility.toLocaleLowerCase()} Â· {tale.status.toLocaleLowerCase()}\r\n              </span>\r\n            </Link>\r\n          ))}\r\n        </aside>\r\n        <section className=\"captain-sessions\">\r\n          <header>\r\n            <h2>{taleFilter ? tales.find((tale) => tale.id === taleFilter)?.title : \"All sessions\"}</h2>\r\n            <span>{shown.length} total</span>\r\n          </header>\r\n          {!shown.length && (\r\n            <div className=\"captain-empty\">\r\n              <span>â—Œ</span>\r\n              <h3>No sessions on this chart</h3>\r\n              <p>Start a published tale or create a Studio preview session.</p>\r\n            </div>\r\n          )}\r\n          {shown\r\n            .filter((session) => !session.previewMode)\r\n            .map((session) => (\r\n              <SessionCard key={session.id} session={session} clock={clock} />\r\n            ))}\r\n          {shown.some((session) => session.previewMode) && (\r\n            <>\r\n              <h3 className=\"preview-divider\">Development previews</h3>\r\n              {shown\r\n                .filter((session) => session.previewMode)\r\n                .map((session) => (\r\n                  <SessionCard key={session.id} session={session} clock={clock} />\r\n                ))}\r\n            </>\r\n          )}\r\n        </section>\r\n      </div>\r\n    </main>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction SessionCard({ session, clock }: { session: Session; clock: number }) {\r\n  const waiting = session.pendingVerification\r\n    ? Math.max(0, clock - Date.parse(session.pendingVerification.requestedAt))\r\n    : 0;\r\n  return (\r\n    <article\r\n      className={`captain-session-card ${session.pendingVerification ? \"waiting\" : \"\"} ${session.previewMode ? \"preview\" : \"\"}`}\r\n    >\r\n      <div className=\"session-signal\">\r\n        <i className={session.connected ? \"connected\" : \"quiet\"} />\r\n        <span>{session.connected ? \"Recent player heartbeat\" : \"No recent player heartbeat\"}</span>\r\n      </div>\r\n      <p className=\"card-kicker\">{session.previewMode ? \"Preview Mode\" : `Version ${session.versionLabel}`}</p>\r\n      <h3>{session.taleTitle}</h3>\r\n      <p>{session.ownerLabel ?? \"Guest crew\"}</p>\r\n      <dl>\r\n        <div>\r\n          <dt>Status</dt>\r\n          <dd>{session.status.toLocaleLowerCase()}</dd>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div>\r\n          <dt>Current block</dt>\r\n          <dd>{session.currentBlockId?.slice(0, 8) ?? \"none\"}</dd>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div>\r\n          <dt>Verification</dt>\r\n          <dd>\r\n            {session.pendingVerification\r\n              ? `${session.pendingVerification.providerType} Â· ${Math.floor(waiting / 1000)}s`\r\n              : \"none pending\"}\r\n          </dd>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div>\r\n          <dt>Last event</dt>\r\n          <dd>{new Date(session.lastEventAt).toLocaleTimeString()}</dd>\r\n        </div>\r\n      </dl>\r\n      <Link className=\"brass-button\" href={`/captain/sessions/${session.id}`}>\r\n        Open session controls\r\n      </Link>\r\n    </article>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

Wait fifteen minutes before trying again.\" },\r\n      { status: 429 },\r\n    );\r\n  const user = await db.gameMasterUser.findUnique({ where: { username: parsed.data.username } });\r\n  const valid = Boolean(user && (await bcrypt.compare(parsed.data.password, user.passwordHash)));\r\n  await db.loginAttempt.create({ data: { fingerprint, succeeded: valid } });\r\n  if (!valid || !user)\r\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"The quartermaster does not recognize those credentials.\" }, { status: 401 });\r\n  const csrfToken = await createGmSession(user.id);\r\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, csrfToken });\r\n}\r\n\"use client\";\r\n\r\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\r\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\r\nimport type { JsonObject } from \"@/tall-tale/types\";\r\n\r\ntype State = {\r\n  session: {\r\n    id: string;\r\n    status: string;\r\n    previewMode: boolean;\r\n    versionId: string;\r\n    ownerLabel: string | null;\r\n    currentSequence: number;\r\n    updatedAt: string;\r\n  };\r\n  tale: { title: string };\r\n  chapter: { title: string } | null;\r\n  block: {\r\n    id: string;\r\n    title: string;\r\n    blockType: string;\r\n    configuration: JsonObject;\r\n    creatorNotes: string | null;\r\n  } | null;\r\n  pendingVerification: { id: string; providerType: string; requestedAt: string } | null;\r\n  inventory: string[];\r\n  variables?: JsonObject;\r\n  events: Array<{\r\n    id: string;\r\n    eventType: string;\r\n    sourceType: string;\r\n    sequence: number;\r\n    payload: JsonObject;\r\n    createdAt: string;\r\n  }>;\r\n  chapters?: Array<{ id: string; title: string; blocks: Array<{ id: string; title: string; blockType: string }> }>;\r\n};\r\n\r\nexport function CaptainSessionControl({ sessionId, authenticated }: { sessionId: string; authenticated: boolean }) {\r\n  const [state, setState] = useState<State | null>(null);\r\n  const [csrf, setCsrf] = useState(\"\");\r\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\r\n  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);\r\n  const [jumpTarget, setJumpTarget] = useState(\"\");\r\n  const [simResult, setSimResult] = useState(\"match\");\r\n  const [confidence, setConfidence] = useState(0.95);\r\n  const load = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    const [detail, list] = await Promise.all([\r\n      fetch(`/api/captain/sessions/${sessionId}`, { cache: \"no-store\" }),\r\n      fetch(\"/api/captain/sessions\", { cache: \"no-store\" }),\r\n    ]);\r\n    const body = (await detail.json()) as State & { error?: string };\r\n    const meta = (await list.json()) as { csrfToken?: string };\r\n    if (!detail.ok) setError(body.error ?? \"Session detail is unavailable.\");\r\n    else {\r\n      setState(body);\r\n      setError(\"\");\r\n    }\r\n    setCsrf(meta.csrfToken ?? \"\");\r\n  }, [sessionId]);\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    if (!authenticated) return;\r\n    queueMicrotask(() => void load());\r\n    const timer = setInterval(() => void load(), 2000);\r\n    return () => clearInterval(timer);\r\n  }, [authenticated, load]);\r\n  async function action(name: string, options: JsonObject = {}) {\r\n    if (\r\n      [\"rollback\", \"jump\", \"override\"].includes(name) &&\r\n      !window.confirm(`${name} changes canonical progression and will be written to the audit history. Continue?`)\r\n    )\r\n      return;\r\n    const reason = [\"rollback\", \"jump\", \"override\", \"reject\"].includes(name)\r\n      ? window.prompt(\"Record a reason for this Captain action:\")\r\n      : \"Captain control\";\r\n    if (reason === null) return;\r\n    setBusy(true);\r\n    const response = await fetch(`/api/captain/sessions/${sessionId}`, {\r\n      method: \"POST\",\r\n      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", \"x-csrf-token\": csrf },\r\n      body: JSON.stringify({ action: name, reason, idempotencyKey: crypto.randomUUID(), ...options }),\r\n    });\r\n    const body = (await response.json()) as { error?: string };\r\n    if (!response.ok) setError(body.error ?? \"Captain action failed.\");\r\n    await load();\r\n    setBusy(false);\r\n  }\r\n  async function simulate(scenario = \"valid\") {\r\n    setBusy(true);\r\n    const response = await fetch(`/api/captain/sessions/${sessionId}/simulate`, {\r\n      method: \"POST\",\r\n      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", \"x-csrf-token\": csrf },\r\n      body: JSON.stringify({ result: simResult, confidence, scenario }),\r\n    });\r\n    const body = (await response.json()) as { error?: string; code?: string };\r\n    setError(\r\n      response.ok\r\n        ? `Simulator accepted the ${simResult} event${scenario === \"duplicate\" ? \" and safely deduplicated its replay\" : \"\"}.`\r\n        : `${body.error ?? \"Simulator event rejected.\"} (${body.code ?? \"rejected\"})`,\r\n    );\r\n    await load();\r\n    setBusy(false);\r\n  }\r\n  if (!authenticated)\r\n    return (\r\n      <main className=\"captain-auth\">\r\n        <section>\r\n          <h1>Captain authentication required</h1>\r\n          <Link href=\"/quartermaster\">Open Quartermaster login</Link>\r\n        </section>\r\n      </main>\r\n    );\r\n  if (!state)\r\n    return (\r\n      <main className=\"captain-session loading\">\r\n        <p role=\"status\">{error || \"Opening the audited session ledgerâ€¦\"}</p>\r\n      </main>\r\n    );\r\n  return (\r\n    <main className=\"captain-session\">\r\n      <header>\r\n        <div>\r\n          <Link href=\"/captain\">â† All sessions</Link>\r\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">\r\n            {state.session.previewMode ? \"Preview session\" : `Pinned ${state.session.versionId.slice(0, 12)}`}\r\n          </p>\r\n          <h1>{state.tale.title}</h1>\r\n          <p>\r\n            {state.session.ownerLabel} Â· {state.session.status.toLocaleLowerCase()} Â· sequence{\" \"}\r\n            {state.session.currentSequence}\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <span className=\"polling-state\">\r\n          <i />\r\n          Canonical state Â· 2s polling\r\n        </span>\r\n      </header>\r\n      {error && (\r\n        <div className=\"captain-notice\" role=\"status\">\r\n          <span>{error}</span>\r\n          <button onClick={() => setError(\"\")}>Dismiss</button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n      <div className=\"session-control-grid\">\r\n        <section className=\"current-state\">\r\n          <p className=\"card-kicker\">Player&apos;s present position</p>\r\n          <h2>{state.chapter?.title}</h2>\r\n          <h3>{state.block?.title}</h3>\r\n          <span>{state.block?.blockType}</span>\r\n          <p>\r\n            {String(\r\n              state.block?.configuration.prompt ??\r\n                state.block?.configuration.heading ??\r\n                state.block?.configuration.body ??\r\n                \"No player summary configured.\",\r\n            )}\r\n          </p>\r\n          {state.block?.creatorNotes && (\r\n            <aside>\r\n              <strong>Private creator note</strong>\r\n              <p>{state.block.creatorNotes}</p>\r\n            </aside>\r\n          )}\r\n          <div className={`pending-request ${state.pendingVerification ? \"active\" : \"quiet\"}`}>\r\n            <strong>\r\n              {state.pendingVerification\r\n                ? `Pending ${state.pendingVerification.providerType}`\r\n                : \"No pending verification\"}\r\n            </strong>\r\n            {state.pendingVerification && (\r\n              <span>Waiting since {new Date(state.pendingVerification.requestedAt).toLocaleTimeString()}</span>\r\n            )}\r\n          </div>\r\n        </section>\r\n        <section className=\"captain-actions\">\r\n          <p className=\"card-kicker\">Authorized controls</p>\r\n          <div>\r\n            {state.pendingVerification && (\r\n              <>\r\n                <button className=\"approve\" disabled={busy} onClick={() => void action(\"approve\")}>\r\n                  Approve verification\r\n                </button>\r\n                <button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void action(\"reject\")}>\r\n                  Reject / request retry\r\n                </button>\r\n                <button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void action(\"override\")}>\r\n                  Explicit override\r\n                </button>\r\n              </>\r\n            )}\r\n            <button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void action(state.session.status === \"PAUSED\" ? state.inventory.map((item) => <li key={item}>{item}</li>) : <li>Empty</li>}</ul>\r\n          <h3>Variables</h3>\r\n          <pre>{JSON.stringify(state.variables ?? {}, null, 2)}</pre>\r\n        </section>\r\n        <section className=\"event-ledger\">\r\n          <p className=\"card-kicker\">Recent event history</p>\r\n          <ol>\r\n            {state.events.map((event) => (\r\n              <li key={event.id}>\r\n                <span>{event.sequence}</span>\r\n                <div>\r\n                  <strong>{event.eventType}</strong>\r\n                  <small>\r\n                    {event.sourceType} Â· {new Date(event.createdAt).toLocaleTimeString()}\r\n                  </small>\r\n                </div>\r\n              </li>\r\n            ))}\r\n          </ol>\r\n        </section>\r\n        {process.env.NODE_ENV !== \"production\" && (\r\n          <section className=\"verification-simulator\">\r\n            <p className=\"card-kicker\">Development tool Â· future provider seam</p>\r\n            <h2>Verification Simulator</h2>\r\n            <p>\r\n              Submits standardized evidence against the current pending request. It cannot issue an unrestricted advance\r\n              command.\r\n            </p>\r\n            <label>\r\n              <span>Outcome</span>\r\n              <select value={simResult} onChange={(event) => setSimResult(event.target.value)}>\r\n                <option value=\"match\">Match</option>\r\n                <option value=\"notMatch\">Not match</option>\r\n                <option value=\"uncertain\">Uncertain</option>\r\n              </select>\r\n            </label>\r\n            <label>\r\n              <span>Confidence {confidence.toFixed(2)}</span>\r\n              <input\r\n                type=\"range\"\r\n                min={0}\r\n                max={1}\r\n                step={0.01}\r\n                value={confidence}\r\n simulate(\"duplicate\")}>\r\n                Test duplicate\r\n              </button>\r\n              <button disabled={busy || !state.pendingVerification} onClick={() => void simulate(\"stale\")}>\r\n                Test stale\r\n              </button>\r\n              <button disabled={busy || !state.pendingVerification} onClick={() => void simulate(\"wrongBlock\")}>\r\n \"next/server\";\r\nimport { apiError } from \"@/tall-tale/api\";\r\nimport { startTaleSession } from \"@/tall-tale/progression\";\r\nimport { setTaleSessionCookie } from remains protected\", async ({ page }) => {\n+  await page.goto(\"/tales\");\n+  await expect(page.getByRole(\"heading\", { name: \"Choose a Tall Tale\" })).toBeVisible();\n+  await expect(page.getByRole(\"heading\", { name: \"The Cartographer's Practice Voyage\" })).toBeVisible();\n+  await expect(page.getByRole(\"link\", { name: \"Open this chart\" })).toBeVisible();\n+  await page.goto(\"/studio\");\n+  await expect(page.getByRole(\"heading\", { name: \"Creator authentication required\" })).toBeVisible();\n+});\n*** Add File: \\\\gwplastics.com\\VT\\Users\\kgray\\My Documents\\treasurehunt\\forever-treasure-companion\\tests\\e2e\\tall-tale-studio.spec.ts\n+import { expect, test, type APIRequestContext } from \"@playwright/test\";\n+\n+test.skip(({ browserName }) => browserName !== \"chromium\", \"The version-pinned mutation workflow runs once.\");\n+\n+const unique = (label: string) => `${label}-${crypto.randomUUID()}`;\n+\n+async function current(request: APIRequestContext, sessionId: string) {\n+  const response = await request.get(`/api/play/sessions/${sessionId}`);\n+  expect(response.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n+  return response.json() as Promise<{\n+    session: { status: string; versionId: string };\n+    block: { id: string; blockType: string; title: string } | null;\n+    pendingVerification: { id: string; providerType: string } | null;\n+  }>;\n+}\n+\n+test(\"published Studio tale completes through player, Captain, and helper contracts\", async ({ browser }) => {\n+  const playerContext = await browser.newContext();\n+  const captainContext = await browser.newContext();\n+  const strangerContext = await browser.newContext();\n+  const player = playerContext.request;\n+  const captain = captainContext.request;\n+\n+  const catalogResponse = await player.get(\"/api/tales\");\n+  expect(catalogResponse.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n+  const catalog = (await catalogResponse.json()) as {\n+    tales: Array<{ slug: string; title: string; version: string }>;\n+  };\n+  expect(catalog.tales).toContainEqual(\n+    expect.objectContaining({ slug: \"development-studio-voyage\", version: \"1.0\" }),\n+  );\n+\n+  const startResponse = await player.post(\"/api/tales/development-studio-voyage/start\", {\n+    data: { ownerLabel: \"Playwright Crew\" },\n+  });\n+  expect(startResponse.status()).toBe(201);\n+  const started = (await startResponse.json()) as { sessionId: string };\n+  const sessionId = started.sessionId;\n+  expect((await strangerContext.request.get(`/api/play/sessions/${sessionId}`)).status()).toBe(401);\n+\n+  let state = await current(player, sessionId);\n+  const pinnedVersionId = state.session.versionId;\n+  expect(state.block).toMatchObject({ blockType: \"narrative\", title: \"The Lantern Wakes\" });\n+\n+  let response = await player.post(`/api/play/sessions/${sessionId}`, {\n+    data: { action: \"continue\", idempotencyKey: unique(\"narrative\") },\n+  });\n+  expect(response.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n+  state = await current(player, sessionId);\n+  expect(state.pendingVerification?.providerType).toBe(\"textAnswer\");\n+\n+  response = await player.post(`/api/play/sessions/${sessionId}`, {\n+    data: { action: \"answer\", answer: \"anchor\", idempotencyKey: unique(\"wrong-answer\") },\n+  });\n+  expect(response.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n+  expect((await response.json()).accepted).toBe(false);\n+  expect((await current(player, sessionId)).block?.blockType).toBe(\"riddle\");\n+\n+  response = await player.post(`/api/play/sessions/${sessionId}`, {\n+    data: { action: \"answer\", answer: \"  LANTERN  \", idempotencyKey: unique(\"right-answer\") },\n+  });\n+  expect(response.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n+  state = await current(player, sessionId);\n+  expect(state.block?.blockType).toBe(\"captainApproval\");\n+  expect(state.pendingVerification?.providerType).toBe(\"captainManual\");\n+\n+  const loginResponse = await captain.post(\"/api/gm/login\", {\n+    data: { username: process.env.GM_USERNAME, [REDACTED: SECRET ASSIGNMENT] },\n+  });\n+  expect(loginResponse.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n+  const { csrfToken } = (await loginResponse.json()) as { csrfToken: string };\n+\n+  const pairResponse = await captain.post(\"/api/helper/pair\", {\n+    headers: { \"x-csrf-token\": csrfToken },\n+    data: { sessionId, deviceId: \"playwright-helper\" },\n+  });\n+  expect(pairResponse.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n+  const { token } = (await pairResponse.json()) as { token: string };\n+  const pending = state.pendingVerification!;\n+  const wrongVersionResponse = await captain.post(\"/api/helper/verification\", {\n+    headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n+    data: {\n+      schemaVersion: 1,\n+      eventId: unique(\"helper-event\"),\n+      idempotencyKey: unique(\"helper-idempotency\"),\n+      eventType: \"verification.observation\",\n+      providerType: \"captainManual\",\n+      providerInstanceId: \"playwright-helper\",\n+      sessionId,\n+      publishedVersionId: `${pinnedVersionId}-wrong`,\n+      blockId: state.block!.id,\n+      verificationRequestId: pending.id,\n+      observedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n+      result: \"match\",\n+      confidence: 0.99,\n+      evidence: { test: true },\n+    },\n+  });\n+  expect(wrongVersionResponse.status()).toBe(409);\n+  expect((await wrongVersionResponse.json()).code).toBe(\"wrongVersion\");\n+\n+  const approval = await captain.post(`/api/captain/sessions/${sessionId}`, {\n+    headers: { \"x-csrf-token\": csrfToken },\n+    data: { action: \"approve\", reason: \"Playwright golden path\", idempotencyKey: unique(\"captain-approve\") },\n+  });\n+  expect(approval.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n+  state = await current(player, sessionId);\n+  expect(state.block?.blockType).toBe(\"chapterComplete\");\n+  expect(state.session.versionId).toBe(pinnedVersionId);\n+\n+  for (const expectedType of [\"travelDirection\", \"confirmation\", \"taleComplete\"]) {\n+    response = await player.post(`/api/play/sessions/${sessionId}`, {\n+      data: { action: \"continue\", idempotencyKey: unique(`continue-${expectedType}`) },\n+    });\n+    expect(response.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n+    state = await current(player, sessionId);\n+    expect(state.block?.blockType).toBe(expectedType);\n+    expect(state.session.versionId).toBe(pinnedVersionId);\n+  }\n+  response = await player.post(`/api/play/sessions/${sessionId}`, {\n+    data: { action: \"continue\", idempotencyKey: unique(\"complete-tale\") },\n+  });\n+  expect(response.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n+  state = await current(player, sessionId);\n+  expect(state.session.status).toBe(\"COMPLETED\");\n+  expect(state.session.versionId).toBe(pinnedVersionId);\n+\n+  await playerContext.close();\n+  await captainContext.close();\n+  await strangerContext.close();\n+});\n*** End Patch";

true,\r\n      mapRoutes: true,\r\n      sideQuests: true,\r\n      events: { orderBy: { sequence: \"asc\" } },\r\n      snapshots: true,\r\n      awards: true,\r\n      auditLogs: true,\r\n      saveStates: true,\r\n      playerAccesses: true,\r\n    },\r\n  });\r\n  assert(campaign, \"the development campaign is missing\");\r\n  assert(campaign.chapters.length >= 5, \"the complete development chapter set is required\");\r\n  assert(campaign.artifacts.length >= 5, \"the complete development artifact set is required\");\r\n  assert(campaign.mapLocations.length >= 5, \"the complete development map set is required\");\r\n  assert(campaign.mapRoutes.length >= 2, \"development route segments are required\");\r\n  assert(campaign.sideQuests.length >= 4, \"development side-quest states are required\");\r\n  assert(campaign.playerAccesses.length === 1, \"exactly one development player access is required\");\r\n  assert(campaign.currentSequence === campaign.events.length, \"campaign sequence must equal its ordered event count\");\r\n  assert(\r\n    campaign.events.every((event, index) => event.sequence === index + 1),\r\n    \"event sequences must be contiguous\",\r\n  );\r\n  assert(\r\n    new Set(campaign.events.map((event) => event.sequence)).size === campaign.events.length,\r\n    \"event sequences must be unique\",\r\n  );\r\n  assert(campaign.snapshots.length === campaign.events.length, \"every progression event must have a campaign snapshot\");\r\n  assert(campaign.auditLogs.length === campaign.events.length, \"every progression event must have an audit record\");\r\n  assert(campaign.awards.length <= campaign.artifacts.length, \"artifact awards must remain unique\");\r\n  const studioTale = await db.tallTale.findUnique({\r\n    where: { slug: \"development-studio-voyage\" },\r\n    include: {\r\n      drafts: { include: { chapters: { include: { blocks: true } } } },\r\n      versions: true,\r\n    },\r\n  });\r\n  assert(studioTale, \"the migrated Studio development tale is missing\");\r\n  assert(studioTale.drafts.length === 1, \"the migrated tale requires one editable draft\");\r\n  assert(studioTale.versions.length === 1, \"the migrated tale requires one immutable published version\");\r\n  assert(\r\n    studioTale.latestPublishedVersionId === studioTale.versions[0].id,\r\n    \"the player catalog must point to the current version\",\r\n  );\r\n  assert(studioTale.drafts[0].chapters.length === 2, \"the migrated Studio draft requires two chapters\");\r\n  assert(\r\n    studioTale.drafts[0].chapters\r\n      .flatMap((chapter) => chapter.blocks)\r\n      .some((block) => block.blockType === \"taleComplete\"),\r\n    \"the migrated Studio draft requires a Tale Complete endpoint\",\r\n  );\r\n  const snapshot = JSON.parse(studioTale.versions[0].contentSnapshot) as {\r\n    schemaVersion?: number;\r\n    chapters?: unknown[];\r\n  };\r\n  assert(\r\n    snapshot.schemaVersion === 1 && Array.isArray(snapshot.chapters),\r\n    \"the published Studio snapshot must be schema-versioned\",\r\n  );\r\n\r\n  if (!acceptance && !preset) {\r\n    assert(campaign.currentSequence === 0, \"a fresh validation database must start at sequence zero\");\r\n    assert(campaign.chapters[0].state === \"LOCKED\", \"a fresh chapter must be locked\");\r\n  } else if (acceptance) {\r\n    const eventTypes = new Set(campaign.events.map((event) => event.type));\r\n    for (const expected of [\r\n      \"CHAPTER_PREPARED\",\r\n      \"CHAPTER_RELEASED\",\r\n      \"ARTIFACT_AWARDED\",\r\n      \"CAMPAIGN_PAUSED\",\r\n      \"CAMPAIGN_RESUMED\",\r\n      \"CHAPTER_SOLVED\",\r\n      \"STATE_REVERTED\",\r\n    ]) {\r\n      assert(eventTypes.has(expected), `acceptance run did not record ${expected}`);\r\n    }\r\n    assert(campaign.awards.length >= 1, \"acceptance run must persist an artifact award\");\r\n    assert(\r\n      campaign.mapLocations.some((location) => location.revealedAt),\r\n      \"acceptance run must persist a released map location\",\r\n    );\r\n    assert(campaign.saveStates.length > 0, \"acceptance run must retain undo save states\");\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  console.log(\r\n    `Database verified: ${campaign.events.length} legacy events, ${campaign.auditLogs.length} audit entries, sequence ${campaign.currentSequence}; Studio version ${studioTale.versions[0].versionLabel}.`,\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n\r\nmain().finally(() => db.$disconnect());\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

{ $response = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri $Url -TimeoutSec 2; if ($response.StatusCode -lt 500) { return } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 }\r\n    } while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline)\r\n    throw \"The application did not become ready at $Url within $Seconds seconds.\"\r\n}\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

If the user explicitly requests the in-app browser and that skill is available, use a distinct persistent binding and immediately read its complete documentation:\r\n\r\n```js\r\nif (globalThis.iab == null) {\r\n  globalThis.iab = await agent.browsers.get(\"iab\");\r\n  nodeRepl.write(await iab.documentation());\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\nIf the user explicitly requests the in-app browser but the Browser skill is not available, report that the in-app browser is unavailable instead of substituting another browser.\r\n\r\nChrome is available only when the Chrome skill is listed for the session. If the user explicitly requests Chrome and that skill is available, use a separate persistent binding and immediately read its complete documentation:\r\n\r\n```js\r\nif (globalThis.chrome == null) {\r\n  globalThis.chrome = await agent.browsers.get(\"extension\");\r\n  nodeRepl.write(await chrome.documentation());\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\nIf the user explicitly requests Chrome but the Chrome skill is not available, report that Chrome is unavailable instead of substituting another browser.\r\n\r\nAn explicit browser choice remains in force for the task. If authentication blocks the task in an explicitly selected browser, your next response must explicitly ask the user to sign in in that browser and tell you when it is ready, unless that browser's documentation provides a supported authentication flow to try first. Merely reporting that sign-in is required is not sufficient. Do not switch to another browser unless the user asks or approves the switch.\r\n\r\n### The task requires browser interaction, the user does not specify a browser, and the task has a target URL\r\n\r\nWhen the user supplies a URL or the intended URL can be reasonably inferred from the request, replace the example below with that URL and let browser-client choose the browser best suited to it:\r\n\r\n```js\r\nif (globalThis.browser == null) {\r\n  globalThis.browser = await agent.browsers.getForUrl(\"https://example.com/\");\r\n  nodeRepl.write(await browser.documentation());\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### The user specifies neither a browser nor a target URL\r\n\r\nUse the runtime default, which prefers the in-app browser when it is available and otherwise uses Chrome. Do not list browsers first:\r\n\r\n```js\r\nif (globalThis.browser == null) {\r\n  globalThis.browser = await agent.browsers.getDefault();\r\n  nodeRepl.write(await browser.documentation());\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n## After setup\r\n\r\nIf setup succeeds but browser discovery or selection fails, read `await agent.documentation.get(\"bootstrap-troubleshooting\")` before resetting the JavaScript session or trying another browser-control mechanism.\r\n\r\nIf the failure is specific to Chrome extension setup, installation, or communication, read `await agent.documentation.get(\"chrome-troubleshooting\")` before retrying or taking another recovery action.\r\n\r\nWhen the user did not explicitly choose a browser, a browser selected by the runtime is not a user constraint. Do not switch browsers based only on an assumption about authentication. If navigation shows that the selected browser lacks the required authentication, select another available browser before asking the user to sign in. You may select it without resetting the Node session. Preserve existing `iab`, `chrome`, and `browser` bindings when they are still useful. Existing tabs remain bound to the browser that created them. After selecting a different browser, obtain a tab from that browser before continuing and read its complete documentation.\r\n\r\nThe ability to interact directly with browsers is exposed through the `browser-client` runtime via the `agent.browsers.*` API. Before trying to interact with a selected browser for the first time, you MUST emit and read the complete documentation returned by its `documentation()` call in one go. For the initial documentation read, run the exact direct `nodeRepl.write(await <browser>.documentation());` call shown in the applicable scenario above. Do not assign the documentation to a variable, inspect its length, slice it, truncate it, summarize it, or emit only an excerpt. Do not proactively split the documentation into pages or chunks. Only if the tool output itself explicitly reports that it was truncated may you emit and read smaller chunks until you have read the documentation in its entirety.\r\n\r\nOnly the Node REPL `js` tool (`mcp__node_repl__js`) can be used to control the selected browser.
