playerCountMin: tale.playerCountMin,\r\n      playerCountMax: tale.playerCountMax,\r\n      estimatedDuration: tale.estimatedDuration,\r\n      contentWarnings: tale.contentWarnings,\r\n      archivedAt: tale.archivedAt?.toISOString() ?? null,\r\n      latestPublishedVersionId: tale.latestPublishedVersionId,\r\n    },\r\n    draft: {\r\n      id: draft.id,\r\n      revisionNumber: draft.revisionNumber,\r\n      autosaveVersion: draft.autosaveVersion,\r\n      validationState: draft.validationState,\r\n      validationSummary: parseJsonObject(draft.validationSummary),\r\n      savedAt: draft.updatedAt.toISOString(),\r\n      chapters: draft.chapters.map((chapter) => ({\r\n        id: chapter.id,\r\n        title: chapter.title,\r\n        subtitle: chapter.subtitle,\r\n        description: chapter.description,\r\n        coverAssetId: chapter.coverAssetId,\r\n        estimatedDuration: chapter.estimatedDuration,\r\n        isOptional: chapter.isOptional,\r\n        metadata: parseJsonObject(chapter.metadata),\r\n        blocks: chapter.blocks.map((block) => ({\r\n          id: block.id,\r\n          blockType: block.blockType,\r\n          title: block.title,\r\n          internalLabel: block.internalLabel,\r\n          configuration: parseJsonObject(block.configuration),\r\n          presentation: parseJsonObject(block.presentation),\r\n          completion: parseJsonObject(block.completion),\r\n          creatorNotes: block.creatorNotes,\r\n          isEnabled: block.isEnabled,\r\n          schemaVersion: block.schemaVersion,\r\n          connections: block.outgoing.map((connection) => ({\r\n            targetBlockId: connection.targetBlockId,\r\n            connectionType: connection.connectionType,\r\n            label: connection.label,\r\n            conditionExpression: connection.conditionExpression,\r\n          })),\r\n        })),\r\n      })),\r\n    },\r\n    assets: tale.assets.map((asset) => ({\r\n      ...publicAsset(asset),\r\n      createdAt: asset.createdAt.toISOString(),\r\n      updatedAt: asset.updatedAt.toISOString(),\r\n      tags: asset.tags.map((link) => link.tag.name),\r\n      roles: asset.roles.map((role) => role.role),\r\n      variants: asset.variants.map((variant) => ({\r\n        ...variant,\r\n        createdAt: variant.createdAt.toISOString(),\r\n        url: `/api/media/${asset.id}?variant=${variant.role}`,\r\n      })),\r\n    })),\r\n    collections: tale.collections,\r\n    locations: tale.locations.map((location) => ({\r\n      ...location,\r\n      verificationProfile: parseJsonObject(location.verificationProfile),\r\n    })),\r\n    artifacts: tale.storyArtifacts,\r\n    versions: tale.versions.map((version) => ({\r\n      id: version.id,\r\n      versionNumber: version.versionNumber,\r\n      versionLabel: version.versionLabel,\r\n      publishedAt: version.publishedAt.toISOString(),\r\n      publishedBy: version.publishedBy,\r\n      releaseNotes: version.releaseNotes,\r\n      isCurrent: version.isCurrent,\r\n      activeSessions: version._count.sessions,\r\n    })),\r\n    registry: serializeBlockRegistry(),\r\n  };\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction json(value: unknown) {\r\n  return JSON.stringify(value ?? {});\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport async function saveStudioDraft(taleId: string, unchecked: StudioDraftInput, userId: string) {\r\n  const input = studioDraftSchema.parse(unchecked);\r\n  for (const chapter of input.chapters) {\r\n    for (const block of chapter.blocks) {\r\n      if (!getBlockDefinition(block.blockType)) throw new Error(`Unknown block type: ${block.blockType}`);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n  return db.$transaction(async (tx) => {\r\n    const tale = await tx.tallTale.findUniqueOrThrow({\r\n      where: { id: taleId },\r\n      include: { drafts: { orderBy: { revisionNumber: \"desc\" }, take: 1 } },\r\n    });\r\n    const draft = tale.drafts[0];\r\n    if (!draft) throw new Error(\"The tale has no editable draft.\");\r\n    const reserved = await tx.tallTale.findFirst({\r\n      where: { slug: input.tale.slug, id: { not: taleId } },\r\n      select: { id: true },\r\n    });\r\n    if (reserved) throw new Error(\"That tale address is already in use.\");\r\n    const claimed = await tx.taleDraft.updateMany({\r\n      where: { id: draft.id, autosaveVersion: input.autosaveVersion },\r\n      data: {\r\n        autosaveVersion: { increment: 1 },\r\n        validationState: \"STALE\",\r\n        validationSummary: \"{}\",\r\n        lastValidatedAt: null,\r\n      },\r\n    });\r\n    if (!claimed.count) {\r\n      const current = await tx.taleDraft.findUniqueOrThrow({\r\n        where: { id: draft.id },\r\n        select: { autosaveVersion: true },\r\n      });\r\n      throw new DraftConflictError(current.autosaveVersion);\r\n    }\r\n    await tx.tallTale.update({\r\n      where: { id: taleId },\r\n      data: {\r\n        title: input.tale.title,\r\n        slug: input.tale.slug,\r\n        subtitle: input.tale.subtitle || null,\r\n        shortDescription: input.tale.shortDescription || null,\r\n        longDescription: input.tale.longDescription || null,\r\n        coverAssetId: input.tale.coverAssetId || null,\r\n        theme: input.tale.theme ?? tale.theme,\r\n        visibility: input.tale.visibility ?? tale.visibility,\r\n        playerCountMin: input.tale.playerCountMin ?? tale.playerCountMin,\r\n        playerCountMax: input.tale.playerCountMax ?? tale.playerCountMax,\r\n        estimatedDuration: input.tale.estimatedDuration ?? null,\r\n        contentWarnings: input.tale.contentWarnings || null,\r\n        creatorId: tale.creatorId || userId,\r\n      },\r\n    });\r\n    await tx.taleChapter.deleteMany({ where: { draftRevisionId: draft.id } });\r\n    const flattened: Array<{ id: string; type: string; configuration: JsonObject }> = [];\r\n    for (let chapterIndex = 0; chapterIndex < input.chapters.length; chapterIndex += 1) {\r\n      const chapter = input.chapters[chapterIndex];\r\n      const createdChapter = await tx.taleChapter.create({\r\n        data: {\r\n          id: chapter.id,\r\n          draftRevisionId: draft.id,\r\n          title: chapter.title,\r\n          subtitle: chapter.subtitle || null,\r\n          description: chapter.description || null,\r\n          orderIndex: chapterIndex,\r\n          coverAssetId: chapter.coverAssetId || null,\r\n          estimatedDuration: chapter.estimatedDuration ?? null,\r\n          entryBlockId: chapter.blocks[0]?.id ?? null,\r\n          completionBlockId:\r\n            [...chapter.blocks]\r\n              .reverse()\r\n              .find((block) => block.blockType === \"chapterComplete\" || block.blockType === \"taleComplete\")?.id ??\r\n            chapter.blocks.at(-1)?.id ??\r\n            null,\r\n          isOptional: chapter.isOptional ?? false,\r\n          metadata: json(chapter.metadata),\r\n        },\r\n      });\r\n      for (let blockIndex = 0; blockIndex < chapter.blocks.length; blockIndex += 1) {\r\n        const block = chapter.blocks[blockIndex];\r\n        await tx.storyBlock.create({\r\n          data: {\r\n            id: block.id,\r\n            chapterId: createdChapter.id,\r\n            blockType: block.blockType,\r\n            title: block.title,\r\n            internalLabel: block.internalLabel || null,\r\n            orderIndex: blockIndex,\r\n            configuration: json(block.configuration),\r\n            presentation: json(block.presentation),\r\n            completion: json(block.completion),\r\n            creatorNotes: block.creatorNotes || null,\r\n            isEnabled: block.isEnabled ?? true,\r\n            schemaVersion: block.schemaVersion ?? 1,\r\n          },\r\n        });\r\n        if (block.isEnabled !== false)\r\n          flattened.push({ id: block.id, type: block.blockType, configuration: block.configuration });\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n    const allBlockIds = new Set(flattened.map((block) => block.id));\r\n    for (let index = 0; index < flattened.length; index += 1) {\r\n      const block = flattened[index];\r\n      const fallback = flattened[index + 1]?.id ?? null;\r\n      const connections: Array<{ target: string; type: string; label?: string; condition?: string }> = [];\r\n      if (block.type === \"choice\" && Array.isArray(block.configuration.choices)) {\r\n        for (const choice of block.configuration.choices as Array<Record<string, unknown>>) {\r\n          const target = typeof choice.targetBlockId === \"string\" ? choice.targetBlockId : \"\";\r\n          if (allBlockIds.has(target))\r\n            connections.push({ target, type: \"CHOICE\", label: String(choice.label ?? \"Choice\") });\r\n        }\r\n      } else if (block.type === \"condition\") {\r\n        const success = String(block.configuration.successTargetBlockId ?? \"\");\r\n        const failure = String(block.configuration.failureTargetBlockId ?? \"\");\r\n        if (allBlockIds.has(success))\r\n          connections.push({ target: success, type: \"SUCCESS\", condition: json({ result: true }) });\r\n        if (allBlockIds.has(failure))\r\n          connections.push({ target: failure, type: \"FAILURE\", condition: json({ result: false }) });\r\n      }\r\n      if (!connections.length && fallback) connections.push({ target: fallback, type: \"DEFAULT\" });\r\n      await tx.storyBlock.update({ where: { id: block.id }, data: { nextBlockId: connections[0]?.target ?? null } });\r\n      for (let connectionIndex = 0; connectionIndex < connections.length; connectionIndex += 1) {\r\n        const connection = connections[connectionIndex];\r\n        await tx.blockConnection.create({\r\n          data: {\r\n            sourceBlockId: block.id,\r\n            targetBlockId: connection.target,\r\n            connectionType: connection.type,\r\n            label: connection.label,\r\n            conditionExpression: connection.condition,\r\n            orderIndex: connectionIndex,\r\n          },\r\n        });\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n    const updated = await tx.taleDraft.findUniqueOrThrow({ where: { id: draft.id } });\r\n    return {\r\n      autosaveVersion: updated.autosaveVersion,\r\n      savedAt: updated.updatedAt.toISOString(),\r\n      validationState: updated.validationState,\r\n    };\r\n  });\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport async function archiveStudioTale(taleId: string, archived: boolean) {\r\n  return db.tallTale.update({\r\n    where: { id: taleId },\r\n    data: { archivedAt: archived ? new Date() : null, status: archived ? \"ARCHIVED\" : undefined },\r\n  });\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport async function duplicateStudioTale(taleId: string, creatorId: string) {\r\n  const source = await getStudioTale(taleId);\r\n  const base = slugify(`${source.tale.slug}-copy`);\r\n  let slug = base;\r\n  let suffix = 2;\r\n  while (await db.tallTale.findUnique({ where: { slug }, select: { id: true } })) slug = `${base}-${suffix++}`;\r\n  const created = await createStudioTale({\r\n    title: `${source.tale.title} Copy`,\r\n    slug,\r\n    subtitle: source.tale.subtitle ?? undefined,\r\n    shortDescription: source.tale.shortDescription ?? undefined,\r\n    longDescription: source.tale.longDescription ?? undefined,\r\n    theme: source.tale.theme,\r\n    playerCountMin: source.tale.playerCountMin,\r\n    playerCountMax: source.tale.playerCountMax,\r\n    estimatedDuration: source.tale.estimatedDuration ?? undefined,\r\n    visibility: \"PRIVATE\",\r\n    initialChapterTitle: source.draft.chapters[0]?.title ?? \"Chapter One\",\r\n    creatorId,\r\n  });\r\n  const target = await getStudioTale(created.id);\r\n  const chapterIds = new Map(source.draft.chapters.map((chapter) => [chapter.id, crypto.randomUUID()]));\r\n  const blockIds = new Map(\r\n    source.draft.chapters.flatMap((chapter) => chapter.blocks.map((block) => [block.id, crypto.randomUUID()] as const)),\r\n  );\r\n  const remapTarget = (value: unknown) =>\r\n    typeof value === \"string\" && blockIds.has(value) ? blockIds.get(value) : value;\r\n  await saveStudioDraft(\r\n    created.id,\r\n    {\r\n      autosaveVersion: target.draft.autosaveVersion,\r\n      tale: { ...source.tale, title: `${source.tale.title} Copy`, slug, visibility: \"PRIVATE\" },\r\n      chapters: source.draft.chapters.map((chapter) => ({\r\n        ...chapter,\r\n        id: chapterIds.get(chapter.id)!,\r\n        blocks: chapter.blocks.map((block) => ({\r\n          ...block,\r\n          id: blockIds.get(block.id)!,\r\n          configuration: {\r\n            ...block.configuration,\r\n            successTargetBlockId: remapTarget(block.configuration.successTargetBlockId),\r\n            failureTargetBlockId: remapTarget(block.configuration.failureTargetBlockId),\r\n            choices: Array.isArray(block.configuration.choices)\r\n              ? block.configuration.choices.map((choice) =>\r\n                  choice && typeof choice === \"object\" && !Array.isArray(choice)\r\n                    ? { ...choice, targetBlockId: remapTarget(choice.targetBlockId) }\r\n                    : choice,\r\n                )\r\n              : block.configuration.choices,\r\n          },\r\n        })),\r\n      })),\r\n    },\r\nimport { createHash } from \"node:crypto\";\nimport { db } from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { eventBus } from \"@/lib/events\";\nimport { getStudioTale } from \"@/tall-tale/studio-service\";\nimport type { PublishedTaleSnapshot } from \"@/tall-tale/types\";\nimport { validateTaleDraft } from \"@/tall-tale/validation\";\n\nexport class PublishValidationError extends Error {\n  constructor(public readonly validation: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof validateTaleDraft>>) {\n    super(\"Draft validation failed. Resolve the blocking issues before publishing.\");\n  }\n}\n\nexport function snapshotFromStudio(studio: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getStudioTale>>): PublishedTaleSnapshot {\n  return {\n    schemaVersion: 1,\n    tale: {\n      id: studio.tale.id,\n      slug: studio.tale.slug,\n      title: studio.tale.title,\n      subtitle: studio.tale.subtitle,\n      shortDescription: studio.tale.shortDescription,\n      longDescription: studio.tale.longDescription,\n      coverAssetId: studio.tale.coverAssetId,\n      theme: studio.tale.theme,\n      visibility: studio.tale.visibility,\n      playerCountMin: studio.tale.playerCountMin,\n      playerCountMax: studio.tale.playerCountMax,\n      estimatedDuration: studio.tale.estimatedDuration,\n      contentWarnings: studio.tale.contentWarnings,\n    },\n    chapters: studio.draft.chapters.map((chapter, chapterIndex) => ({\n      id: chapter.id,\n      title: chapter.title,\n      subtitle: chapter.subtitle,\n      description: chapter.description,\n      coverAssetId: chapter.coverAssetId,\n      estimatedDuration: chapter.estimatedDuration,\n      isOptional: chapter.isOptional,\n      metadata: chapter.metadata,\n      orderIndex: chapterIndex,\n      entryBlockId: chapter.blocks[0]?.id ?? null,\n      completionBlockId:\n        [...chapter.blocks]\n          .reverse()\n          .find((block) => block.blockType === \"chapterComplete\" || block.blockType === \"taleComplete\")?.id ??\n        chapter.blocks.at(-1)?.id ??\n        null,\n      blocks: chapter.blocks.map((block, blockIndex) => ({\n        id: block.id,\n        chapterId: chapter.id,\n        blockType: block.blockType,\n        title: block.title,\n        internalLabel: block.internalLabel,\n        configuration: block.configuration,\n        presentation: block.presentation,\n        completion: block.completion,\n        creatorNotes: null,\n        isEnabled: block.isEnabled,\n        schemaVersion: block.schemaVersion,\n        orderIndex: blockIndex,\n        nextBlockId: block.connections[0]?.targetBlockId ?? null,\n        connections: block.connections.map((connection, connectionIndex) => ({\n          ...connection,\n          orderIndex: connectionIndex,\n        })),\n      })),\n    })),\n    assets: studio.assets.map((asset) => ({\n      id: asset.id,\n      mediaType: asset.mediaType,\n      displayName: asset.displayName,\n      description: asset.description,\n      mimeType: asset.mimeType,\n      width: asset.width,\n      height: asset.height,\n      roles: asset.roles,\n      variants: asset.variants.map((variant) => ({\n        id: variant.id,\n        role: variant.role,\n        mimeType: variant.mimeType,\n        processingState: variant.processingState,\n      })),\n    })) as PublishedTaleSnapshot[\"assets\"],\n    locations: studio.locations.map((location) => ({ ...location, captainNotes: undefined })),\n    artifacts: studio.artifacts,\n    publishedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n  };\n}\n\nexport async function publishTale(\n  taleId: string,\n  publisherId: string,\n  releaseNotes: string,\n  expectedAutosaveVersion?: number,\n) {\n  const validation = await validateTaleDraft(taleId);\n  if (!validation.valid) throw new PublishValidationError(validation);\n  if (expectedAutosaveVersion !== undefined && validation.autosaveVersion !== expectedAutosaveVersion)\n    throw new Error(\"The draft changed before publishing. Review the latest saved version and try again.\");\n  const studio = await getStudioTale(taleId);\n  if (studio.draft.autosaveVersion !== validation.autosaveVersion)\n    throw new Error(\"The draft changed during validation. Publish again after reviewing the current draft.\");\n  const snapshot = snapshotFromStudio(studio);\n  const contentSnapshot = JSON.stringify(snapshot);\n  const checksum = createHash(\"sha256\").update(contentSnapshot).digest(\"hex\");\n  const version = await db.$transaction(async (tx) => {\n    const latest = await tx.publishedTaleVersion.findFirst({ where: { taleId }, orderBy: { versionNumber: \"desc\" } });\n    const versionNumber = (latest?.versionNumber ?? 0) + 1;\n    await tx.publishedTaleVersion.updateMany({ where: { taleId, isCurrent: true }, data: { isCurrent: false } });\n    const created = await tx.publishedTaleVersion.create({\n      data: {\n        taleId,\n        versionNumber,\n        versionLabel: versionNumber === 1 ? \"1.0\" : `1.${versionNumber - 1}`,\n        publishedBy: publisherId,\n        releaseNotes: releaseNotes.trim() || null,\n        contentSnapshot,\n        checksum,\n        isCurrent: true,\n      },\n    });\n    await tx.tallTale.update({\n      where: { id: taleId },\n      data: { status: \"PUBLISHED\", latestPublishedVersionId: created.id },\n    });\n    return created;\n  });\n  eventBus.emit(\"tall-tale:catalog\", {\n    type: \"catalog.updated\",\n    taleId,\n    versionId: version.id,\n    at: version.publishedAt.toISOString(),\n  });\n  return {\n    id: version.id,\n    versionNumber: version.versionNumber,\n    versionLabel: version.versionLabel,\n    checksum: version.checksum,\n    publishedAt: version.publishedAt.toISOString(),\n  };\n}\n\nexport function parsePublishedSnapshot(raw: string): PublishedTaleSnapshot {\n  const snapshot = JSON.parse(raw) as PublishedTaleSnapshot;\n  if (snapshot.schemaVersion !== 1 || !Array.isArray(snapshot.chapters))\n    throw new Error(\"This published tale uses an unsupported schema version.\");\n  return snapshot;\n}\n\r\n  @@index([campaignId, sequence])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel ViewedCeremony {\r\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  campaignId String\r\n  deviceId   String\r\n  eventId    String\r\n  viewedAt   DateTime @default(now())\r\n\r\n  @@unique([campaignId, deviceId, eventId])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel LoginAttempt {\r\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\r\n  fingerprint String\r\n  succeeded   Boolean\r\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\r\n\r\n  @@index([fingerprint, createdAt])\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Tall Tale Studio is deliberately additive. The original Campaign models above\r\n// continue to power the existing Forever Treasure experience while authored tales\r\n// use an immutable publish-and-session model.\r\nmodel TallTale {\r\n  id                       String                 @id @default(cuid())\r\n  slug                     String                 @unique\r\n  title                    String\r\n  subtitle                 String?\r\n  shortDescription         String?\r\n  longDescription          String?\r\n  coverAssetId             String?\r\n  theme                    String                 @default(\"CARTOGRAPHERS_TABLE\")\r\n  status                   String                 @default(\"DRAFT\")\r\n  visibility               String                 @default(\"PRIVATE\")\r\n  creatorId                String\r\n  currentDraftRevisionId   String?\r\n  latestPublishedVersionId String?\r\n  playerCountMin           Int                    @default(1)\r\n  playerCountMax           Int                    @default(4)\r\n  estimatedDuration        Int?\r\n  contentWarnings          String?\r\n  sortOrder                Int                    @default(0)\r\n  featured                 Boolean                @default(false)\r\n  archivedAt               DateTime?\r\n  createdAt                DateTime               @default(now())\r\n  updatedAt                DateTime               @updatedAt\r\n  drafts                   TaleDraft[]\r\n  versions                 PublishedTaleVersion[]\r\n  assets                   TaleAsset[]\r\n  collections              TaleAssetCollection[]\r\n  locations                TaleLocation[]\r\n  storyArtifacts           TaleArtifact[]\r\n  sessions                 TaleSession[]\r\n\r\n  @@index([status, visibility, sortOrder])\r\n  @@index([creatorId, updatedAt])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel TaleDraft {\r\n  id                        String        @id @default(cuid())\r\n  taleId                    String\r\n  revisionNumber            Int           @default(1)\r\n  basedOnPublishedVersionId String?\r\n  createdBy                 String\r\n  autosaveVersion           Int           @default(1)\r\n  validationState           String        @default(\"NOT_VALIDATED\")\r\n  validationSummary         String        @default(\"{}\")\r\n  lastValidatedAt           DateTime?\r\n  createdAt                 DateTime      @default(now())\r\n  updatedAt                 DateTime      @updatedAt\r\n  tale                      TallTale      @relation(fields: [taleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  chapters                  TaleChapter[]\r\n\r\n  @@unique([taleId, revisionNumber])\r\n  @@index([taleId, updatedAt])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel TaleChapter {\r\n  id                String       @id @default(cuid())\r\n  draftRevisionId   String\r\n  title             String\r\n  subtitle          String?\r\n  description       String?\r\n  orderIndex        Int\r\n  coverAssetId      String?\r\n  estimatedDuration Int?\r\n  entryBlockId      String?\r\n  completionBlockId String?\r\n  isOptional        Boolean      @default(false)\r\n  metadata          String       @default(\"{}\")\r\n  createdAt         DateTime     @default(now())\r\n  updatedAt         DateTime     @updatedAt\r\n  draft             TaleDraft    @relation(fields: [draftRevisionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  blocks            StoryBlock[]\r\n\r\n  @@unique([draftRevisionId, orderIndex])\r\n  @@index([draftRevisionId])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel StoryBlock {\r\n  id            String            @id @default(cuid())\r\n  chapterId     String\r\n  blockType     String\r\n  title         String\r\n  internalLabel String?\r\n  orderIndex    Int\r\n  configuration String            @default(\"{}\")\r\n  presentation  String            @default(\"{}\")\r\n  completion    String            @default(\"{}\")\r\n  nextBlockId   String?\r\n  creatorNotes  String?\r\n  isEnabled     Boolean           @default(true)\r\n  schemaVersion Int               @default(1)\r\n  createdAt     DateTime          @default(now())\r\n  updatedAt     DateTime          @updatedAt\r\n  chapter       TaleChapter       @relation(fields: [chapterId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  outgoing      BlockConnection[] @relation(\"BlockConnectionSource\")\r\n  incoming      BlockConnection[] @relation(\"BlockConnectionTarget\")\r\n\r\n  @@unique([chapterId, orderIndex])\r\n  @@index([chapterId, blockType])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel BlockConnection {\r\n  id                  String     @id @default(cuid())\r\n  sourceBlockId       String\r\n  targetBlockId       String\r\n  connectionType      String     @default(\"DEFAULT\")\r\n  conditionExpression String?\r\n  label               String?\r\n  orderIndex          Int        @default(0)\r\n  createdAt           DateTime   @default(now())\r\n  source              StoryBlock @relation(\"BlockConnectionSource\", fields: [sourceBlockId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  target              StoryBlock @relation(\"BlockConnectionTarget\", fields: [targetBlockId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n\r\n  @@unique([sourceBlockId, targetBlockId, connectionType])\r\n  @@index([targetBlockId])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel PublishedTaleVersion {\r\n  id              String        @id @default(cuid())\r\n  taleId          String\r\n  versionNumber   Int\r\n  versionLabel    String\r\n  publishedAt     DateTime      @default(now())\r\n  publishedBy     String\r\n  releaseNotes    String?\r\n  contentSnapshot String\r\n  schemaVersion   Int           @default(1)\r\n  checksum        String\r\n  isCurrent       Boolean       @default(true)\r\n  tale            TallTale      @relation(fields: [taleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  sessions        TaleSession[]\r\n\r\n  @@unique([taleId, versionNumber])\r\n  @@index([taleId, isCurrent])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel TaleAsset {\r\n  id               String                    @id @default(cuid())\r\n  taleId           String\r\n  mediaType        String\r\n  displayName      String\r\n  description      String?\r\n  originalFilename String\r\n  currentVariantId String?\r\n  mimeType         String\r\n  fileSize         Int\r\n  width            Int?\r\n  height           Int?\r\n  duration         Float?\r\n  checksum         String\r\n  createdBy        String\r\n  createdAt        DateTime                  @default(now())\r\n  updatedAt        DateTime                  @updatedAt\r\n  deletedAt        DateTime?\r\n  tale             TallTale                  @relation(fields: [taleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n  variants         TaleAssetVariant[]\r\n  tags             TaleAssetTagLink[]\r\n  roles            TaleAssetRole[]\r\n  collectionItems  TaleAssetCollectionItem[]\r\n\r\n  @@unique([taleId, checksum])\r\n  @@index([taleId, mediaType, deletedAt])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel TaleAssetVariant {\r\n  id              String    @id @default(cuid())\r\n  assetId         String\r\n  role            String\r\n  storageKey      String    @unique\r\n  mimeType        String\r\n  fileSize        Int\r\n  width           Int?\r\n  height          Int?\r\n  duration        Float?\r\n  checksum        String\r\n  processingState String    @default(\"READY\")\r\n  createdAt       DateTime  @default(now())\r\n  asset           TaleAsset @relation(fields: [assetId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\n\r\n  @@index([assetId, role, createdAt])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel TaleAssetTag {\r\n  id        String             @id @default(cuid())\r\n  taleId    String\r\n  name      String\r\n  createdAt DateTime           @default(now())\r\n  assets    TaleAssetTagLink[]\r\n\r\n  @@unique([taleId, name])\r\n}\r\n\r\nmodel TaleAssetTagLink {\r\n  assetId String\r\n  tagId   String\r\n  asset   TaleAsset    @relation(fields: [assetId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\r\nimport { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { requireGmCapability, verifyCsrf } from \"@/lib/security\";\nimport { apiError } from \"@/tall-tale/api\";\nimport { ingestAsset } from \"@/tall-tale/assets\";\nimport { getStudioTale } from \"@/tall-tale/studio-service\";\n\nexport async function GET(_: Request, context: { params: Promise<{ taleId: string }> }) {\n  if (!(await requireGmCapability(\"MANAGE_ASSETS\")))\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Asset permission required.\" }, { status: 403 });\n  try {\n    const studio = await getStudioTale((await context.params).taleId);\n    return NextResponse.json({ assets: studio.assets, collections: studio.collections });\n  } catch (cause) {\n    return apiError(cause);\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function POST(request: Request, context: { params: Promise<{ taleId: string }> }) {\n  const session = await requireGmCapability(\"MANAGE_ASSETS\");\n  if (!session) return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Asset permission required.\" }, { status: 403 });\n  if (!(await verifyCsrf(session)))\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"The creator session expired.\" }, { status: 403 });\n  try {\n    const data = await request.formData();\n    const files = data.getAll(\"files\").filter((item): item is File => item instanceof File);\n    if (!files.length) return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Choose at least one file.\" }, { status: 400 });\n    const assets = [];\n    for (const file of files) assets.push(await ingestAsset((await context.params).taleId, file, session.userId));\n    return NextResponse.json({ assets }, { status: 201 });\n  } catch (cause) {\n    return apiError(cause);\n  }\n}\n\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

(\r\n                  <img src={`/api/media/${asset.id}?variant=THUMBNAIL`} alt=\"\" />\r\n                ) : (\r\n                  <div className=\"asset-kind\">{asset.mediaType}</div>\r\n                )}\r\n                <h3>{asset.displayName}</h3>\r\n                <p>{asset.width && asset.height ? `${asset.width} Ã— ${asset.height}` : asset.mimeType}</p>\r\n                <div>\r\n                  {asset.roles.map((role) => (\r\n                    <span key={role}>{role}</span>\r\n                  ))}\r\n                  {asset.tags.map((tag) => (\r\n                    <span key={tag}>#{tag}</span>\r\n                  ))}\r\n                </div>\r\n                <div className=\"asset-card-actions\">\r\n                  <button onClick={() => void editAsset(asset)}>Edit metadata</button>\r\n                  <label className=\"asset-replace\">\r\n                    Replace file\r\n                    <input type=\"file\" onChange={(event) => void replaceAsset(asset, event.target.files)} />\r\n                  </label>\r\n                </div>\r\n                <button\r\n                  onClick={async () => {\r\n                    if (!window.confirm(`Archive ${asset.displayName}? Referenced assets will be protected.`)) return;\r\n                    const response = await fetch(`/api/studio/assets/${asset.id}`, {\r\n                      method: \"DELETE\",\r\n                      headers: { \"x-csrf-token\": data.csrfToken },\r\n                    });\r\n                    const body = (await response.json()) as { usages?: Array<{ label: string }>; error?: string };\r\n                    if (!response.ok)\r\n                      setError(\r\n                        body.usages?.length\r\n                          ? `Still used by: ${body.usages.map((item) => item.label).join(\", \")}`\r\n                          : (body.error ?? \"Could not archive asset.\"),\r\n                      );\r\n                    else await load();\r\n                  }}\r\n                >\r\n                  Archive\r\n                </button>\r\n              </article>\r\n            ))}\r\n          </div>\r\n          <h3>Collections</h3>\r\n          <div className=\"record-list\">\r\n            {data.collections.map((item) => (\r\n              <article key={item.id}>\r\n                <strong>{item.name}</strong>\r\n                <span>{item.collectionType}</span>\r\n                <button onClick={() => void libraryAction(\"collection\", \"update\", item.id)}>Edit</button>\r\n                <button onClick={() => void libraryAction(\"collection\", \"archive\", item.id)}>Delete</button>\r\n              </article>\r\n            ))}\r\n          </div>\r\n        </LibraryPanel>\r\n      )}\r\n      {initialSection === \"locations\" && (\r\n        <LibraryPanel\r\n          title=\"Locations\"\r\n          eyebrow=\"Destinations and verification references\"\r\n          action={<button onClick={() => void libraryAction(\"location\", \"create\")}>Create location</button>}\r\n        >\r\n          <p className=\"panel-note\">\r\n            Reference and negative-reference collections can be prepared now for the future vision helper. Recognition\r\n            is not active in Phase 1.\r\n          </p>\r\n          <div className=\"record-grid\">\r\n            {data.locations.map((item) => (\r\n              <article key={item.id}>\r\n                <p className=\"card-kicker\">{item.region || \"Uncharted region\"}</p>\r\n                <h3>{item.name}</h3>\r\n                <p>{item.playerFacingDescription || \"No player description yet.\"}</p>\r\n                <small>\r\n                  {item.referenceCollectionId ? \"Reference collection assigned\" : \"No verification references\"}\r\n                </small>\r\n                <button onClick={() => void libraryAction(\"location\", \"update\", item.id)}>Edit</button>\r\n                <button onClick={() => void libraryAction(\"location\", \"archive\", item.id)}>Archive</button>\r\n              </article>\r\n            ))}\r\n          </div>\r\n        </LibraryPanel>\r\n      )}\r\n      {initialSection === \"artifacts\" && (\r\n        <LibraryPanel\r\n          title=\"Artifacts\"\r\n          eyebrow=\"Lore and collection rewards\"\r\n          action={<button onClick={() => void libraryAction(\"artifact\", \"create\")}>Create artifact</button>}\r\n        >\r\n          <div className=\"record-grid\">\r\n            {data.artifacts.map((item) => (\r\n              <article key={item.id}>\r\n                <p className=\"card-kicker\">{item.ordinaryGameObjectLabel || \"Story object\"}</p>\r\n                <h3>{item.name}</h3>\r\n                <p>{item.shortDescription || item.loreDescription || \"No lore has been written.\"}</p>\r\n                <button onClick={() => void libraryAction(\"artifact\", \"update\", item.id)}>Edit</button>\r\n                <button onClick={() => void libraryAction(\"artifact\", \"archive\", item.id)}>Archive</button>\r\n              </article>\r\n            ))}\r\n          </div>\r\n        </LibraryPanel>\r\n      )}\r\n      {initialSection === \"versions\" && (\r\n        <LibraryPanel\r\n          title=\"Version History\"\r\n          eyebrow=\"Immutable releases\"\r\n          action={<button onClick={() => void publish()}>Publish current draft</button>}\r\n        >\r\n          <div className=\"version-list\">\r\n            {!data.versions.length && <p>No published version exists yet.</p>}\r\n            {data.versions.map((version) => (\r\n              <article key={version.id}>\r\n                <span className={version.isCurrent ? \"current\" : \"\"}>v{version.versionLabel}</span>\r\n                <div>\r\n                  <strong>{new Date(version.publishedAt).toLocaleString()}</strong>\r\n                  <p>{version.releaseNotes || \"No release notes.\"}</p>\r\n                </div>\r\n                <small>\r\n                  {version.activeSessions} pinned session{version.activeSessions === 1 ? \"\" : \"s\"}\r\n                </small>\r\n              </article>\r\n            ))}\r\n          </div>\r\n        </LibraryPanel>\r\n      )}\r\n      {(assetDrawer || initialSection === \"assets\") && (\r\n        <aside className={`asset-drawer ${assetDrawer ? \"open\" : \"page-open\"}`} aria-label=\"Asset drawer\">\r\n          <header>\r\n            <div>\r\n              <p className=\"eyebrow\">Media hold</p>\r\n              <h2>Upload and reuse event.preventDefault();\r\n              void upload(event.dataTransfer.files);\r\n            }}\r\n          >\r\n            <input\r\n              type=\"file\"\r\n              multiple\r\n candidates.filter((candidate) => allowedVariantIds.has(candidate.id))\n273-    : candidates;\n274-  const variant =\n275-    allowed.find((candidate) => candidate.role === requestedRole) ??\n276- unavailable.\");\n279:  return { variant, buffer: await readFile(keyPath(variant.storageKey)) };\n280-}\nimport { createHash, randomUUID } from \"node:crypto\";\nimport { mkdir, readFile, writeFile } from \"node:fs/promises\";\nimport path from \"node:path\";\nimport sharp from \"sharp\";\nimport { db } from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { parsePublishedSnapshot } from \"@/tall-tale/publishing\";\nimport { getStudioTale } from \"@/tall-tale/studio-service\";\n\nconst supported = new Map([\n  [\"image/png\", { mediaType: \"IMAGE\", extension: \".png\" }],\n  [\"image/jpeg\", { mediaType: \"IMAGE\", extension: \".jpg\" }],\n  [\"image/webp\", { mediaType: \"IMAGE\", extension: \".webp\" }],\n  [\"image/avif\", { mediaType: \"IMAGE\", extension: \".avif\" }],\n  [\"video/mp4\", { mediaType: \"VIDEO\", extension: \".mp4\" }],\n  [\"video/webm\", { mediaType: \"VIDEO\", extension: \".webm\" }],\n  [\"audio/mpeg\", { mediaType: \"AUDIO\", extension: \".mp3\" }],\n  [\"audio/ogg\", { mediaType: \"AUDIO\", extension: \".ogg\" }],\n  [\"audio/wav\", { mediaType: \"AUDIO\", extension: \".wav\" }],\n  [\"application/pdf\", { mediaType: \"DOCUMENT\", extension: \".pdf\" }],\n]);\n\nfunction storageRoot() {\n  return path.resolve(process.cwd(), process.env.TALL_TALE_ASSET_ROOT ?? \".data/tall-tale-assets\");\n}\n\nfunction keyPath(storageKey: string) {\n  if (!/^[a-f0-9-]+\\/[a-f0-9-]+\\.[a-z0-9]+$/.test(storageKey)) throw new Error(\"Invalid opaque storage key.\");\n  const root = storageRoot();\n  const resolved = path.resolve(root, storageKey);\n  if (!resolved.startsWith(`${root}${path.sep}`)) throw new Error(\"Invalid storage path.\");\n  return resolved;\n}\n\nfunction hasValidSignature(buffer: Buffer, mimeType: string) {\n  if (mimeType === \"image/png\") return buffer.subarray(0, 8).equals(Buffer.from([137, 80, 78, 71, 13, 10, 26, 10]));\n  if (mimeType === \"image/jpeg\") return buffer[0] === 0xff && buffer[1] === 0xd8;\n  if (mimeType === \"image/webp\")\n    return buffer.subarray(0, 4).toString() === \"RIFF\" && buffer.subarray(8, 12).toString() === \"WEBP\";\n  if (mimeType === \"image/avif\") return buffer.subarray(4, 12).toString().includes(\"ftyp\");\n  if (mimeType === \"application/pdf\") return buffer.subarray(0, 5).toString() === \"%PDF-\";\n  if (mimeType === \"video/mp4\") return buffer.subarray(4, 12).toString().includes(\"ftyp\");\n  if (mimeType === \"video/webm\" || mimeType === \"audio/webm\")\n    return buffer.subarray(0, 4).equals(Buffer.from([0x1a, 0x45, 0xdf, 0xa3]));\n  if (mimeType === \"audio/mpeg\")\n    return buffer.subarray(0, 3).toString() === \"ID3\" || (buffer[0] === 0xff && (buffer[1] & 0xe0) === 0xe0);\n  if (mimeType === \"audio/ogg\") return buffer.subarray(0, 4).toString() === \"OggS\";\n  if (mimeType === \"audio/wav\")\n    return buffer.subarray(0, 4).toString() === \"RIFF\" && buffer.subarray(8, 12).toString() === \"WAVE\";\n  return false;\n}\n\nasync function store(storageKey: string, buffer: Buffer) {\n  const target = keyPath(storageKey);\n  await mkdir(path.dirname(target), { recursive: true });\n  await writeFile(target, buffer, { flag: \"wx\" });\n}\n\nasync function derivativeSet(buffer: Buffer, folder: string) {\n  const metadata = await sharp(buffer).metadata();\n  const definitions = [\n    { role: \"THUMBNAIL\", width: 360, quality: 72 },\n    { role: \"PREVIEW\", width: 960, quality: 78 },\n    { role: \"OPTIMIZED\", width: 1800, quality: 84 },\n    { role: \"MOBILE\", width: 900, quality: 80 },\n  ];\n  const items: Array<{\n    role: string;\n    storageKey: string;\n    mimeType: string;\n    buffer: Buffer;\n    width: number | null;\n    height: number | null;\n    checksum: string;\n  }> = [];\n  for (const definition of definitions) {\n    const output = await sharp(buffer)\n      .rotate()\n      .resize({ width: definition.width, withoutEnlargement: true })\n      .webp({ quality: definition.quality })\n      .toBuffer({ resolveWithObject: true });\n    const storageKey = `${folder}/${randomUUID()}.webp`;\n    items.push({\n      role: definition.role,\n      storageKey,\n      mimeType: \"image/webp\",\n      buffer: output.data,\n      width: output.info.width,\n      height: output.info.height,\n      checksum: createHash(\"sha256\").update(output.data).digest(\"hex\"),\n    });\n  }\n  return { width: metadata.width ?? null, height: metadata.height ?? null, items };\n}\n\nexport async function ingestAsset(taleId: string, file: File, userId: string, replaceAssetId?: string) {\n  const definition = supported.get(file.type);\n  if (!definition)\n    throw new Error(\"Unsupported file type. Use PNG, JPEG, WebP, AVIF, MP4, WebM, MP3, Ogg, WAV, or PDF.\");\n  const maximum = Number(process.env.TALL_TALE_MAX_UPLOAD_MB ?? 25) * 1024 * 1024;\n  if (!file.size || file.size > maximum)\n    throw new Error(`Files must be smaller than ${Math.round(maximum / 1024 / 1024)} MB.`);\n  const buffer = Buffer.from(await file.arrayBuffer());\n  if (!hasValidSignature(buffer, file.type)) throw new Error(\"The file contents do not match the reported media type.\");\n  const checksum = createHash(\"sha256\").update(buffer).digest(\"hex\");\n  if (!replaceAssetId) {\n    const duplicate = await db.taleAsset.findUnique({\n      where: { taleId_checksum: { taleId, checksum } },\n      include: { variants: true, tags: { include: { tag: true } }, roles: true },\n    });\n    if (duplicate) return { asset: duplicate, duplicate: true };\n  }\n  const folder = randomUUID();\n  const originalKey = `${folder}/${randomUUID()}${definition.extension}`;\n  await store(originalKey, buffer);\n  let width: number | null = null;\n  let height: number | null = null;\n  let derivatives: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof derivativeSet>>[\"items\"] = [];\n  if (definition.mediaType === \"IMAGE\") {\n    const processed = await derivativeSet(buffer, folder);\n    width = processed.width;\n    height = processed.height;\n    derivatives = processed.items;\n    for (const item of derivatives) await store(item.storageKey, item.buffer);\n  }\n  const asset = await db.$transaction(async (tx) => {\n    const record = replaceAssetId\n      ? await tx.taleAsset.update({\n          where: { id: replaceAssetId },\n          data: {\n            displayName: file.name.replace(/\\.[^.]+$/, \"\"),\n            originalFilename: file.name,\n            mimeType: file.type,\n            fileSize: file.size,\n            width,\n            height,\n            checksum,\n            mediaType: definition.mediaType,\n            deletedAt: null,\n          },\n        })\n      : await tx.taleAsset.create({\n          data: {\n            taleId,\n            mediaType: definition.mediaType,\n            displayName: file.name.replace(/\\.[^.]+$/, \"\"),\n            originalFilename: file.name,\n            mimeType: file.type,\n            fileSize: file.size,\n            width,\n            height,\n            checksum,\n            createdBy: userId,\n          },\n        });\n    const original = await tx.taleAssetVariant.create({\n      data: {\n        assetId: record.id,\n        role: \"ORIGINAL\",\n        storageKey: originalKey,\n        mimeType: file.type,\n        fileSize: file.size,\n        width,\n        height,\n        checksum,\n      },\n    });\n    let optimizedVariantId: string | null = null;\n    for (const item of derivatives) {\n      const derivative = await tx.taleAssetVariant.create({\n        data: {\n          assetId: record.id,\n          role: item.role,\n          storageKey: item.storageKey,\n          mimeType: item.mimeType,\n          fileSize: item.buffer.length,\n          width: item.width,\n          height: item.height,\n          checksum: item.checksum,\n        },\n      });\n      if (item.role === \"OPTIMIZED\") optimizedVariantId = derivative.id;\n    }\n    await tx.taleAsset.update({\n      where: { id: record.id },\n      data: { currentVariantId: optimizedVariantId ?? original.id },\n    });\n    return tx.taleAsset.findUniqueOrThrow({\n      where: { id: record.id },\n      include: { variants: { orderBy: { createdAt: \"desc\" } }, tags: { include: { tag: true } }, roles: true },\n    });\n  });\n  return { asset, duplicate: false };\n}\n\nexport async function assetUsages(taleId: string, assetId: string) {\n  const studio = await getStudioTale(taleId);\n  const usages: Array<{ type: string; id: string; label: string; field?: string }> = [];\n  if (studio.tale.coverAssetId === assetId)\n    usages.push({ type: \"tale\", id: taleId, label: \"Tall Tale cover\", field: \"coverAssetId\" });\n  for (const chapter of studio.draft.chapters) {\n    if (chapter.coverAssetId === assetId)\n      usages.push({ type: \"chapter\", id: chapter.id, label: `${chapter.title} cover`, field: \"coverAssetId\" });\n    for (const block of chapter.blocks)\n      for (const [field, value] of Object.entries(block.configuration))\n        if (value === assetId) usages.push({ type: \"block\", id: block.id, label: block.title, field });\n  }\n  for (const location of studio.locations)\n    for (const field of [\"mapAssetId\", \"displayAssetId\"] as const)\n      if (location[field] === assetId) usages.push({ type: \"location\", id: location.id, label: location.name, field });\n  for (const artifact of studio.artifacts)\n    for (const field of [\"artworkAssetId\", \"revealVideoAssetId\", \"modelAssetId\"] as const)\n      if (artifact[field] === assetId) usages.push({ type: \"artifact\", id: artifact.id, label: artifact.name, field });\n  return usages;\n}\n\nexport async function updateAsset(\n  assetId: string,\n  input: { displayName?: string; description?: string; tags?: string[]; roles?: string[]; collectionIds?: string[] },\n) {\n  const asset = await db.taleAsset.findUniqueOrThrow({ where: { id: assetId } });\n  return db.$transaction(async (tx) => {\n    await tx.taleAsset.update({\n      where: { id: assetId },\n      data: { displayName: input.displayName?.trim() || undefined, description: input.description?.trim() || null },\n    });\n    if (input.tags) {\n      await tx.taleAssetTagLink.deleteMany({ where: { assetId } });\n      for (const name of [...new Set(input.tags.map((tag) => tag.trim().toLocaleLowerCase()).filter(Boolean))]) {\n        const tag = await tx.taleAssetTag.upsert({\n          where: { taleId_name: { taleId: asset.taleId, name } },\n          update: {},\n          create: { taleId: asset.taleId, name },\n        });\n        await tx.taleAssetTagLink.create({ data: { assetId, tagId: tag.id } });\n      }\n    }\n    if (input.roles) {\n      await tx.taleAssetRole.deleteMany({ where: { assetId } });\n      for (const role of [...new Set(input.roles)]) await tx.taleAssetRole.create({ data: { assetId, role } });\n    }\n    if (input.collectionIds) {\n      await tx.taleAssetCollectionItem.deleteMany({ where: { assetId } });\n      for (const collectionId of input.collectionIds)\n        await tx.taleAssetCollectionItem.create({ data: { assetId, collectionId } });\n    }\n    return tx.taleAsset.findUniqueOrThrow({\n      where: { id: assetId },\n      include: { variants: true, tags: { include: { tag: true } }, roles: true, collectionItems: true },\n    });\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function archiveAsset(assetId: string) {\n  const asset = await db.taleAsset.findUniqueOrThrow({ where: { id: assetId } });\n  const usages = await assetUsages(asset.taleId, assetId);\n  if (usages.length) return { archived: false, usages };\n  await db.taleAsset.update({ where: { id: assetId }, data: { deletedAt: new Date() } });\n  return { archived: true, usages: [] };\n}\n\nexport async function resolveAssetVariant(assetId: string, requestedRole: string, versionIdentity?: string) {\n  let allowedVariantIds: Set<string> | null = null;\n  if (versionIdentity && !versionIdentity.startsWith(\"draft:\")) {\n    const version = await db.publishedTaleVersion.findUnique({ where: { id: versionIdentity } });\n    if (!version) throw new Error(\"Published asset version not found.\");\n    const asset = parsePublishedSnapshot(version.contentSnapshot).assets.find((item) => item.id === assetId);\n    if (!asset) throw new Error(\"Asset is not part of this published version.\");\n    allowedVariantIds = new Set(asset.variants?.map((variant) => variant.id) ?? []);\n  }\n  const candidates = await db.taleAssetVariant.findMany({ where: { assetId }, orderBy: { createdAt: \"desc\" } });\n  const allowed = allowedVariantIds\n    ? candidates.filter((candidate) => allowedVariantIds.has(candidate.id))\n    : candidates;\n  const variant =\n    allowed.find((candidate) => candidate.role === requestedRole) ??\n    allowed.find((candidate) => candidate.role === \"OPTIMIZED\") ??\n    allowed.find((candidate) => candidate.role === \"ORIGINAL\");\n  if (!variant) throw new Error(\"Asset file is unavailable.\");\n  return { variant, buffer: await readFile(keyPath(variant.storageKey)) };\n}\n\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

[],\n-    [assetSearch, data],\n-  );\n+  const referencedIds = useMemo(() => {\n+    const ids = new Set<string>();\n+    if (!draft) return ids;\n+    const assetIds = new Set(data?.assets.map((asset) => asset.id) ?? []);\n+    const visit = (value: unknown) => {\n+      if (typeof value === \"string\" && assetIds.has(value)) ids.add(value);\n+      else if (Array.isArray(value)) value.forEach(visit);\n+      else if (value && typeof value === \"object\") Object.values(value).forEach(visit);\n+    };\n+    visit(draft.tale.coverAssetId);\n+    draft.chapters.forEach((chapter) => {\n+      visit(chapter.coverAssetId);\n+      chapter.blocks.forEach((block) => visit(block.configuration));\n+    });\n+    return ids;\n+  }, [data, draft]);\n+  const filteredAssets = useMemo(() => {\n+    const query = assetSearch.toLocaleLowerCase();\n+    return (\n+      data?.assets\n+        .filter((asset) =>\n+          `${asset.displayName} ${asset.description ?? \"\"} ${asset.tags.join(\" \")} ${asset.roles.join(\" \")}`\n+            .toLocaleLowerCase()\n+            .includes(query),\n+        )\n+        .filter((asset) => assetMedia === \"ALL\" || asset.mediaType === assetMedia)\n+        .filter((asset) => assetRole === \"ALL\" || asset.roles.includes(assetRole))\n+        .filter(\n+          (asset) =>\n+            assetCollection === \"ALL\" ||\n+            asset.collectionItems.some((item) => item.collectionId === assetCollection),\n+        )\n+        .filter(\n+          (asset) =>\n+            assetUsage === \"ALL\" ||\n+            (assetUsage === \"USED\" ? referencedIds.has(asset.id) : !referencedIds.has(asset.id)),\n+        )\n+        .sort((left, right) => new Date(right.updatedAt).getTime() - new Date(left.updatedAt).getTime()) ?? []\n+    );\n+  }, [assetCollection, assetMedia, assetRole, assetSearch, assetUsage, data, referencedIds]);\n+  const filteredRegistry = useMemo(() => {\n+    const query = blockSearch.toLocaleLowerCase();\n+    return data?.registry.filter((item) => `${item.displayName} ${item.description} ${item.category}`.toLocaleLowerCase().includes(query)) ?? [];\n+  }, [blockSearch, data]);\n*** End Patch";

const patch = "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: \\\\gwplastics.com\\VT\\Users\\kgray\\My Documents\\treasurehunt\\forever-treasure-companion\\src\\components\\studio\\TaleEditor.tsx\n@@\n   async function preview(blockId?: string) {\n@@\n     window.open(body.url, \"_blank\", \"noopener,noreferrer\");\n   }\n+\n+  async function taleAction(action: \"duplicate\" | \"archive\") {\n+    if (!data) return;\n+    if (action === \"archive\" && !window.confirm(\"Archive this Tall Tale? Published sessions remain pinned and safe.\"))\n+      return;\n+    const response = await fetch(`/api/studio/tales/${taleId}`, {\n+      method: \"POST\",\n+      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", \"x-csrf-token\": data.csrfToken },\n+      body: JSON.stringify({ action }),\n+    });\n+    const body = (await response.json()) as { id?: string; error?: string };\n+    if (!response.ok) return setError(body.error ?? `The tale could not be ${action}d.`);\n+    window.location.assign(action === \"duplicate\" && body.id ? `/studio/tales/${body.id}` : \"/studio\");\n+  }\n+\n+  async function versionAction(version: Version, action: \"preview\" | \"restore\") {\n+    if (!data) return;\n+    if (\n+      action === \"restore\" &&\n+      !window.confirm(\n+        `Copy version ${version.versionLabel} into a new editable draft? The immutable release and current draft history will remain intact.`,\n+      )\n+    )\n+      return;\n+    const response = await fetch(`/api/studio/tales/${taleId}/versions/${version.id}`, {\n+      method: \"POST\",\n+      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", \"x-csrf-token\": data.csrfToken },\n+      body: JSON.stringify({ action }),\n+    });\n+    const body = (await response.json()) as { url?: string; error?: string };\n+    if (!response.ok) return setError(body.error ?? `Version ${version.versionLabel} could not be ${action}ed.`);\n+    if (action === \"preview\" && body.url) window.open(body.url, \"_blank\", \"noopener,noreferrer\");\n+    else {\n+      setSelectedId(null);\n+      await load();\n+      setSaveState(`Version ${version.versionLabel} copied into a new draft`);\n+    }\n+  }\n+\n+  async function showAssetUsages(asset: Asset) {\n+    const response = await fetch(`/api/studio/assets/${asset.id}`, { cache: \"no-store\" });\n+    const body = (await response.json()) as { usages?: Array<{ label: string; field?: string }>; error?: string };\n+    if (!response.ok) return setError(body.error ?? \"Asset usages could not be loaded.\");\n+    window.alert(\n+      body.usages?.length\n+        ? `${asset.displayName} is used by:\\n${body.usages.map((item) => `â€¢ ${item.label}${item.field ? ` (${item.field})` : \"\"}`).join(\"\\n\")}`\n+        : `${asset.displayName} is not referenced by the current draft.`,\n+    );\n+  }\n*** End Patch";
text(await tools.apply_patch(patch));

[]);\n    setCsrf(body.csrfToken ?? \"\");\n  }\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!authenticated) return;\n    queueMicrotask(() => void load());\n  }, [authenticated]);\n\n  const visible = useMemo(() => {\n    const filtered = tales.filter((tale) =>\n      `${tale.title} ${tale.subtitle ?? \"\"} ${tale.shortDescription ?? \"\"}`\n        .toLocaleLowerCase()\n        .includes(query.toLocaleLowerCase()),\n    );\n    return filtered.sort((left, right) =>\n      sort === \"title\"\n        ? left.title.localeCompare(right.title)\n        : sort === \"status\"\n          ? left.status.localeCompare(right.status)\n          : Date.parse(right.savedAt) - Date.parse(left.savedAt),\n    );\n  }, [query, sort, tales]);\n\n  async function act(tale: TaleCard, action: \"duplicate\" | \"archive\" | \"restore\") {\n    if (\n      (action === \"archive\" || action === \"restore\") &&\n      !window.confirm(`${action === \"archive\" ? \"Archive\" : \"Restore\"} â€œ${tale.title}â€?`)\n    )\n      return;\n    setBusy(tale.id);\n    setError(\"\");\n    const response = await fetch(`/api/studio/tales/${tale.id}`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", \"x-csrf-token\": csrf },\n      body: JSON.stringify({ action }),\n    });\n    const body = (await response.json()) as { error?: string };\n    if (!response.ok) setError(body.error ?? \"The ledger action failed.\");\n    await load();\n    setBusy(\"\");\n  }\n\n  if (!authenticated)\n    return (\n      <main className=\"studio-auth-gate\">\n        <section>\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">Tall Tale Studio</p>\n          <h1>The Cartographer&apos;s Table is locked.</h1>\n          <p>Sign in through the Quartermaster&apos;s Log with a creator-capable account, then return here.</p>\n          <Link className=\"brass-button\" href=\"/quartermaster\">\n            Open Quartermaster login\n          </Link>\n        </section>\n      </main>\n    );\n\n  return (\n    <main className=\"studio-home\">\n      <header className=\"studio-home-header\">\n        <div>\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">Authoring waters</p>\n          <h1>Tall Tale Studio</h1>\n          <p>Draft stories, bind their assets, and publish voyages from one authoritative chart.</p>\n        </div>\n        <nav aria-label=\"Studio destinations\">\n          <Link href=\"/tales\">Player catalog</Link>\n          <Link href=\"/captain\">Captain controls</Link>\n          <Link className=\"brass-button\" href=\"/studio/tales/new\">\n            Create New Tall Tale\n          </Link>\n        </nav>\n      </header>\n      <section className=\"studio-toolbar\" aria-label=\"Find Tall Tales\">\n        <label>\n          <span>Search</span>\n          <input\n            value={query}\n            onChange={(event) => setQuery(event.target.value)}\n            placeholder=\"Title, subtitle, or description\"\n          />\n        </label>\n        <label>\n          <span>Sort</span>\n          <select value={sort} onChange={(event) => setSort(event.target.value)}>\n            <option value=\"recent\">Last saved</option>\n            <option value=\"title\">Title</option>\n            <option value=\"status\">Status</option>\n          </select>\n        </label>\n        <p aria-live=\"polite\">\n          {visible.length} {visible.length === 1 ? \"tale\" : \"tales\"}\n        </p>\n      </section>\n      {error && (\n        <p className=\"studio-error\" role=\"alert\">\n          {error}\n        </p>\n      )}\n      {!visible.length ? (\n        <section className=\"studio-empty\">\n          <span aria-hidden=\"true\">âœ¦</span>\n          <h2>No Tall Tales on this chart</h2>\n          <p>Create the first editable voyage, or clear the current search.</p>\n          <Link className=\"brass-button\" href=\"/studio/tales/new\">\n            Create a Tall Tale\n          </Link>\n        </section>\n      ) : (\n        <section className=\"tale-card-grid\" aria-label=\"Tall Tales\">\n          {visible.map((tale) => (\n            <article className={`tale-studio-card status-${tale.status.toLowerCase()}`} key={tale.id}>\n              <div className=\"tale-card-stamp\">{tale.status.replaceAll(\"_\", \" \")}</div>\n              <p className=\"card-kicker\">\n                {tale.visibility.toLocaleLowerCase()} Â·{\" \"}\n                {tale.latestVersion ? `version ${tale.latestVersion}` : \"not published\"}\n              </p>\n              <h2>{tale.title}</h2>\n              <p>{tale.subtitle ?? tale.shortDescription ?? \"No summary has been inked yet.\"}</p>\n              <dl>\n                <div>\n                  <dt>Last saved</dt>\n                  <dd>{new Date(tale.savedAt).toLocaleString()}</dd>\n                </div>\n                <div>\n                  <dt>Validation</dt>\n                  <dd>{tale.validationState.toLocaleLowerCase()}</dd>\n                </div>\n                <div>\n                  <dt>Library</dt>\n                  <dd>{tale.assetCount} assets</dd>\n                </div>\n                <div>\n                  <dt>Sessions</dt>\n                  <dd>{tale.sessionCount}</dd>\n                </div>\n              </dl>\n              <div className=\"tale-card-actions\">\n                <Link className=\"primary\" href={`/studio/tales/${tale.id}`}>\n                  Open editor\n                </Link>\n                {tale.latestVersion && (\n                  <Link href={`/play/${tale.slug}`} target=\"_blank\">\n                    Player preview\n                  </Link>\n                )}\n                <button disabled={busy === tale.id} onClick={() => void act(tale, \"duplicate\")}>\n                  Duplicate\n                </button>\n                <button\n                  disabled={busy === tale.id}\n                  onClick={() => void act(tale, tale.status === \"ARCHIVED\" ? \"restore\" : \"archive\")}\n                >\n                  {tale.status === \"ARCHIVED\" ? \"Restore\" : \"Archive\"}\n                </button>\n              </div>\n            </article>\n          ))}\n        </section>\n      )}\n    </main>\n  );\n}\n\r\nimport { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { requireGmCapability, verifyCsrf } from \"@/lib/security\";\nimport { apiError } from \"@/tall-tale/api\";\nimport { createStudioTale, listStudioTales } from \"@/tall-tale/studio-service\";\n\nexport async function GET() {\n  const session = await requireGmCapability(\"CREATE_TALES\");\n  if (!session) return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Creator authentication required.\" }, { status: 401 });\n  return NextResponse.json({ csrfToken: session.csrfToken, tales: await listStudioTales() });\n}\n\nexport async function POST(request: Request) {\n  const session = await requireGmCapability(\"CREATE_TALES\");\n  if (!session) return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Creator authentication required.\" }, { status: 401 });\n  if (!(await verifyCsrf(session)))\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"The creator session expired. Reload and try again.\" }, { status: 403 });\n  try {\n    return NextResponse.json(await createStudioTale({ ...(await request.json()), creatorId: session.userId }), {\n      status: 201,\n    });\n  } catch (cause) {\n    return apiError(cause);\n  }\n}\n\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

\"\"));\n  }, [authenticated]);\n  if (!authenticated)\n    return (\n      <main className=\"studio-auth-gate\">\n        <section>\n          <h1>Creator authentication required</h1>\n          <Link className=\"brass-button\" href=\"/quartermaster\">\n            Open Quartermaster login\n          </Link>\n        </section>\n      </main>\n    );\n  return (\n    <main className=\"new-tale-page\">\n      <form\n        className=\"new-tale-sheet\"\n        onSubmit={async (event) => {\n          event.preventDefault();\n          setBusy(true);\n          setError(\"\");\n          const values = Object.fromEntries(new FormData(event.currentTarget));\n          const response = await fetch(\"/api/studio/tales\", {\n            method: \"POST\",\n            headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", \"x-csrf-token\": csrf },\n            body: JSON.stringify({\n              ...values,\n              title,\n              slug,\n              playerCountMin: Number(values.playerCountMin),\n              playerCountMax: Number(values.playerCountMax),\n              estimatedDuration: Number(values.estimatedDuration) || undefined,\n            }),\n          });\n          const body = (await response.json()) as { id?: string; error?: string };\n          if (!response.ok || !body.id) {\n            setError(body.error ?? \"The new tale could not be created.\");\n            setBusy(false);\n            return;\n          }\n          router.push(`/studio/tales/${body.id}`);\n        }}\n      >\n        <Link href=\"/studio\">â† Back to Studio</Link>\n        <p className=\"eyebrow\">Lay a fresh chart</p>\n        <h1>Create a New Tall Tale</h1>\n        <p>Start with the voyage identity and first chapter. Every field remains editable.</p>\n        <div className=\"form-grid\">\n          <label className=\"wide\">\n            <span>Title</span>\n            <input\n              value={title}\n              onChange={(event) => {\n                setTitle(event.target.value);\n                if (!slugEdited) setSlug(slugify(event.target.value));\n              }}\n              required\n              maxLength={160}\n            />\n          </label>\n          <label className=\"wide\">\n            <span>Address</span>\n            <span className=\"field-prefix\">/play/</span>\n            <input\n              value={slug}\n              onChange={(event) => {\n                setSlugEdited(true);\n                setSlug(event.target.value.toLocaleLowerCase());\n              }}\n              required\n              pattern=\"[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*\"\n            />\n          </label>\n          <label>\n            <span>Subtitle</span>\n            <input name=\"subtitle\" maxLength={240} />\n          </label>\n          <label>\n            <span>Theme</span>\n            <select name=\"theme\">\n              <option value=\"CARTOGRAPHERS_TABLE\">Cartographer&apos;s Table</option>\n              <option value=\"MOONLIT_JOURNAL\">Moonlit Journal</option>\n              <option value=\"CAPTAINS_CABIN\">Captain&apos;s Cabin</option>\n            </select>\n          </label>\n          <label className=\"wide\">\n            <span>Short description</span>\n            <textarea name=\"shortDescription\" maxLength={600} rows={3} />\n          </label>\n          <label className=\"wide\">\n            <span>Long description</span>\n            <textarea name=\"longDescription\" maxLength={20000} rows={5} />\n          </label>\n          <label>\n            <span>Minimum players</span>\n            <input name=\"playerCountMin\" type=\"number\" min={1} max={20} defaultValue={1} />\n          </label>\n          <label>\n            <span>Maximum players</span>\n            <input name=\"playerCountMax\" type=\"number\" min={1} max={20} defaultValue={4} />\n          </label>\n          <label>\n            <span>Estimated minutes</span>\n            <input name=\"estimatedDuration\" type=\"number\" min={1} max={10000} defaultValue={90} />\n          </label>\n          <label>\n            <span>Visibility</span>\n            <select name=\"visibility\">\n              <option value=\"PRIVATE\">Private draft</option>\n              <option value=\"UNLISTED\">Unlisted after publish</option>\n              <option value=\"PUBLIC\">Public after publish</option>\n            </select>\n          </label>\n          <label className=\"wide\">\n            <span>Initial chapter title</span>\n            <input name=\"initialChapterTitle\" defaultValue=\"Chapter One\" required />\n          </label>\n        </div>\n        {error && (\n          <p className=\"studio-error\" role=\"alert\">\n            {error}\n          </p>\n        )}\n        <div className=\"form-actions\">\n          <Link href=\"/studio\">Cancel</Link>\n          <button className=\"brass-button\" disabled={busy}>\n            {busy ? \"Opening the chartâ€¦\" : \"Create and open editor\"}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </form>\n    </main>\n  );\n}\n\r\nimport { NewTaleForm } from \"@/components/studio/NewTaleForm\";\nimport { requireGmCapability } from \"@/lib/security\";\nexport const dynamic = \"force-dynamic\";\nexport default async function NewTalePage() {\n  return const patch = "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: \\\\gwplastics.com\\VT\\Users\\kgray\\My Documents\\treasurehunt\\forever-treasure-companion\\src\\components\\studio\\NewTaleForm.tsx\n@@\n   const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);\n   const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n+  const [coverFile, setCoverFile] = useState<File | null>(null);\n@@\n           if (!response.ok || !body.id) {\n@@\n             return;\n           }\n+          if (coverFile) {\n+            const upload = new FormData();\n+            upload.append(\"files\", coverFile);\n+            const uploadResponse = await fetch(`/api/studio/tales/${body.id}/assets`, {\n+              method: \"POST\",\n+              headers: { \"x-csrf-token\": csrf },\n+              body: upload,\n+            });\n+            const uploaded = (await uploadResponse.json()) as {\n+              assets?: Array<{ asset?: { id?: string } }>;\n+              error?: string;\n+            };\n+            const coverAssetId = uploaded.assets?.[0]?.asset?.id;\n+            if (!uploadResponse.ok || !coverAssetId) {\n+              setError(`The tale was created, but its cover could not be uploaded: ${uploaded.error ?? \"unknown upload error\"}`);\n+              setBusy(false);\n+              return;\n+            }\n+            const studioResponse = await fetch(`/api/studio/tales/${body.id}`, { cache: \"no-store\" });\n+            const studio = (await studioResponse.json()) as {\n+              tale?: Record<string, unknown>;\n+              draft?: { autosaveVersion: number; chapters: unknown[] };\n+              error?: string;\n+            };\n+            if (!studioResponse.ok || !studio.tale || !studio.draft) {\n+              setError(`The tale and cover were created, but the cover could not be assigned: ${studio.error ?? \"draft unavailable\"}`);\n+              setBusy(false);\n+              return;\n+            }\n+            const saveResponse = await fetch(`/api/studio/tales/${body.id}/draft`, {\n+              method: \"PATCH\",\n+              headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", \"x-csrf-token\": csrf },\n+              body: JSON.stringify({\n+                autosaveVersion: studio.draft.autosaveVersion,\n+                tale: { ...studio.tale, coverAssetId },\n+                chapters: studio.draft.chapters,\n+              }),\n+            });\n+            if (!saveResponse.ok) {\n+              const saved = (await saveResponse.json()) as { error?: string };\n+              setError(`The tale and cover were created, but the cover could not be assigned: ${saved.error ?? \"save failed\"}`);\n+              setBusy(false);\n+              return;\n+            }\n+          }\n           router.push(`/studio/tales/${body.id}`);\n@@\n           <label className=\"wide\">\n             <span>Initial chapter title</span>\n             <input name=\"initialChapterTitle\" defaultValue=\"Chapter One\" required />\n           </label>\n+          <label className=\"wide\">\n+            <span>Cover image (optional)</span>\n+            <input\n+              type=\"file\"\n+              accept=\"image/png,image/jpeg,image/webp,image/avif\"\n+              onChange={(event) => setCoverFile(event.target.files?.[0] ?? null)}\n+            />\n+            <small>The original is preserved and optimized player variants are generated after creation.</small>\n+          </label>\n*** End Patch";
text(await tools.apply_patch(patch));
